Name: Womenability
Description:
Fondée en 2015, Womenability porte des valeurs féministes, engagées et intersectionnelles et s’attache à créer des solutions concrètes pour un urbanisme plus durable et inclusif pour tou.te.s.

Womenability croise son engagement associatif fort à une offre de conseil auprès des acteurs de l'urbanisme. 
Elle accompagne décideurs, constructeurs et aménageurs à développer des projets urbains et politiques urbaines égalitaires et inclusives. En constant dialogue avec des acteurs aux agendas divers, Womenability oeuvre à la prise en main la plus totale du genre dans l'urbanisme.

Forte de son expérience, Womenability accompagne à la fois les acteurs des villes françaises et leurs homologues européens et internationaux. 

Nos axes de travail :
- Projets urbains : Womenability accompagne les collectivités dans la réalisation de diagnostics genre et usages sur leurs territoires pour proposer des recommandations d'aménagement co-construites avec les habitant.e.s et les intégrer aux documents d'urbanisme.
- Volet réglementaire : Womenability accompagne les collectivités à l'inclusion du genre dans le domaine réglementaire. 
- Urbanisme international : Womenability mobilise son expertise internationale en proposant la production de rapports de démarches gender sensitive à destination de maitrises d'ouvrage.
- Formation : Womenability propose des interventions et des formations auprès de collectivités et d'acteurs de l’aménagement pour transmettre sa méthodologie d'intégration du genre dans les projets urbains.
- Sensibilisation : Womenability intervient auprès de publics diversifiés et notamment  d'établissements scolaires, où elle propose un cycle d’ateliers traitant des questions de genre dans l’espace public et de discriminations genrées.

Name: Thomas Mae Land & New Homes
Description:
As a leading name in the land and new homes sector, we’re incredibly proud of what we do and the people and companies who we work with. 

The partnerships we’ve created with experts such as architects, planners and development finance providers enable us to provide a comprehensive, trusted service. And we never forget that our clients – landowners, developers and some of Britain’s leading house builders – are looking for sound advice and solid results.

We have on-the-ground teams across the UK and alongside our extensive Land & New Homes Network agents who have a proven track record in identifying development opportunities. And when it comes advising landowners on the strategies to maximise the value of their land through disposal or development, we can help them get the returns they’re looking for (on terms that work for everyone).

With over 40 years’ experience behind us, we remain a company with ambition and count ourselves lucky to work in an exciting sector that’s building a brighter future for so many.

Name: SOLARBIO AFRICA
Description:
Entreprise de développement durable spécialisée dans la construction de écologiques - les énergies renouvelables (biogaz domestique et le solaire photovoltaïque) - l'assainissement écologique - L'eau potable et forage hydraulique - l'agroécologie et les eco-services dans l'immobilier.
Nous sommes une entreprise qui développe des innovations dans la construction de bâtiments, surtout des bâtiments écologiques autonomes en énergie combustible et électrique, mais également nous fournissons tous types de services dans le domaine de l'environnement, de l'assainissement et fournissons les éco-services de l'immobilier.
Nous offrons aussi des solutions pratiques et innovantes dans les énergies renouvelables (surtout le biogaz et le solaire photovoltaïque)

Adresses: solarbioafrica@gmail.com / CEl: +225 07 77 87 61 56 / +225 01 02 533 888

Name: Biosis Real Estate Development Inc
Description:
ABOUT US

At Biosis Real Estate Development Inc, we don’t just build properties—we create opportunities for better living. Our mission is to develop sustainable, profitable, and community-driven real estate projects that enhance the way people live, work, and invest.

 OUR VISION
The word Biosis means “mode of life,” and that’s exactly what we aim to create—thoughtfully designed spaces that improve quality of life while delivering strong financial returns for investors. We believe that real estate development should be more than just constructing buildings; it should be about shaping communities, driving economic growth, and building a better future.

 WHAT WE DO
 Sustainable & Smart Development – We design and build energy-efficient, environmentally responsible projects that stand the test of time.
 Profitable Investment Opportunities – Our developments provide stable, long-term returns through strategic real estate investment.
 Innovative Problem-Solving – We merge architecture, urban planning, and investment strategies to create high-value real estate solutions.

 WHY CHOOSE US
With extensive expertise in architecture, construction, and real estate investment, we approach every project with a unique perspective—balancing design excellence, financial viability, and long-term community impact.

We’re here to design, create, and realize a better mode of life for our clients, investors, and communities. 

Let’s build something meaningful together.

Name: WOCODA
Description: De Volkshuisvestingbeurs WOCODA vormt de schakel tussen overheid, woningcorporaties en marktpartijen om de urgente woningbouwopgave in Nederland te versnellen. Centraal staan twee thema’s: het snel realiseren van meer woningen met woningconcepten en het effectief huisvesten van specifieke doelgroepen. WOCODA biedt een platform waar samenwerking en innovatieve oplossingen elkaar ontmoeten om deze uitdagingen aan te pakken en Nederland verder te helpen.

Name: West Midlands Housing Association Partnership (WMHAP)
Description:
The West Midlands Housing Association Partnership (WMHAP) brings together 17 housing associations from across the West Midlands, united by a single purpose – that everyone should be able to live in a safe, good quality and warm home they can afford.

Our members:

Black Country Housing Group l Bournville Village Trust l Bromford l Citizen l Green Square Accord l Lench’s Trust l Midland Heart l Nehemiah Housing l Orbit Group l The Pioneer Group l Platform Housing Group l Rooftop Housing Group l Stonewater l St. Basils l Trident Group l WHG l The Wrekin Housing Group

Name: Kāinga Maha
Description:
We are a not-for-profit property developer committed to bringing flourishing communities to life.

We work to raise the standard for housing developments that are deeply rooted in the unique needs of the communities we serve.

We take a purpose-focused approach to design and planning, which means we create for the people that live in the communities we develop and build.

Name: East End Homes
Description:
We’re a locally based and community-led housing association managing nearly 4,000 homes in Tower Hamlets, London. Our team of over 120 staff provide a housing service that is efficient, offers value for money, and meets the needs and aspirations of all residents.

Being local is part of our DNA. Our housing offices and neighbourhood centres are located in the communities we serve on the estates of Mile End, Island Gardens, St George's, Glamis and Holland.

Resident volunteers shape all areas of our work, from the main Board to community events and our Food for Aldgate foodbank. We partner with public and private sector organisations to offer innovative services and invest in new housing.

We regularly work with businesses to support their social responsibility goals, hosting events for corporate volunteers to make a difference.

Our high staff retention reflects our supportive environment and community-focused workforce, with many colleagues living locally.

Our values:

We value and support resident involvement.
We strive to provide the best possible service.
We recognise and value the commitment and hard work of our staff.
We welcome and support diversity and are committed to equality.
We aim to improve and succeed in all aspects of our work.

We are:

London Living Wage Employer
Age Friendly Employer
TPAS Member
Disability Confident
Proud Corporate Sponsor of Women in Social Housing
Placeshapers member
National Housing Federation member
Chartered Institute of Housing member

Our Board includes professionals from housing, regeneration, finance, law, sustainability, community, and volunteering sectors.

Name: Til Vægs
Description:
Til Vægs er en nonprofit organisation for kunst i det offentlige rum, arkitektur og sociale byrumsløsninger, der holder til på Nørrebro i den almene boligforening AKB København, Lundtoftegade. 

Til Vægs er stiftet som udstillingssted i 2016 og er opstået i en stærk tro på kunstens kraft og forundringens potentiale. Vores fokus i dag er stadig eksperimenterende samtidskunst fra øverste hylde, og vi forsøger at blende kunsten ind nye steder og i kombinerende praksisser. 

I vores arbejde med kunsten som metode for forandringer og fællesskab understøtter vi byer og boligområders fysiske såvel som sociale infrastruktur.

Det gør vi bl.a. gennem tværfaglig facilitering af buttom-up byudviklingsprocesser og opbygning af demokratisk rammer for menneskelig sameksistens og udvikling på tværs af aktører. 

Det giver os tre ligeværdige ben: Kunst, bypolitk og socialt ansvar.

Vi forsøger at lade os inspirere af og lede af metoder formuleret i sociale kunstpraksisser og indenfor bypolitisk aktivisme, og deltager i sociale og bypolitiske forandringer over hele landet. 

Kunsten befinder sig ligesom os godt i mellemrummene og kan her ikke bare skubbe til verden, men vise nye mulige verdner frem.

Name: Jennison Management Company
Description: Providing affordable housing communities for Seniors and Families on the East Coast.

Name: Housing Hub of New Brunswick
Description: Recognizing that housing affordability is vital to sustainable communities, the Housing Hub of New Brunswick (HHNB) partners to drive housing development across all of New Brunswick. Through a disciplined approach and a focus on execution, the HHNB combines relevant stakeholder resources, connections, and experience to expand development of housing projects that are diverse, inclusive, and sustainable.

Name: Stockport Mayoral Development Corporation
Description: The Stockport Mayoral Development Corporation is a radical new approach to tackling future housing need and the changing role of town centres. It provides a blueprint for how powers and devolved funding combined with strong local leadership and a compelling long-term vision, can set a new benchmark for town centre regeneration. The vision for Town Centre West is credible and compelling – to scale up the delivery of new urban neighbourhood homes in Greater Manchester– and the MDC is ideally placed to bring together stakeholders to make the vision a reality.

Name: Nevada Housing Coalition
Description: Our Mission: To promote the development and preservation of affordable housing for all Nevadans through collaboration, education, and advocacy.

Name: CAHEC Properties Corporation
Description: CAHEC Properties Corporation is a non-profit that preserves and owns affordable housing in the Southeast. In addition to being the general partner of over 200 residential properties in five states, we continually pursue investments that align with our core mission of preserving, improving, and expanding affordable housing opportunities. We have one of the largest USDA Rural Development portfolios in the United States.

Name: ABC+ Warranty
Description:
Passionate suppliers of Architect's Certificates and Home Warranties, specialising in new builds and property conversions. Our offerings hold the seal of approval from the esteemed Council of Mortgage Lenders (CML), reflecting our unwavering commitment to quality.

Established in 1989, we've been at the forefront as lender-approved CML Certification experts, setting the industry standard. Whether it's a new project or conversion endeavour, we excel in all aspects.

Our competitive edge is constant, complemented by our nationwide reach and lightning-fast responsiveness. Count on us to go above and beyond.

Name: Fitzpatrick & Heavey Homes
Description:
Fitzpatrick & Heavey Homes is a leading Irish property developer, dedicated to delivering large-scale residential projects that set new standards in quality and community living.

With our trusted team of experts, we have rapidly expanded within the Irish market, taking on large-scale housing projects that meet the growing demand for modern, sustainable homes. As the scale and ambition of our work increases, we remain committed to the highest standards in design, construction, and community integration.

We take pride in identifying areas of opportunity and creating vibrant neighbourhoods that meet the needs of families and individuals alike. Our focus is firmly on residential development, building homes that support thriving communities and contribute to Ireland’s housing future.

Name: Alinea Land Corporation
Description: As the Hamilton/Burlington region's largest private landowners we strive to build thriving community ecosystems in which people can live, work, play, and flourish.   We believe in the power and potential of collaboration and work closely with investors and innovators across public and private sectors as we undertake community development projects. Our goal is to leverage these resources to scale social impact so that we better match the magnitude of the social needs/problems we are trying to address.

Name: Ynni Cymunedol Cymru | Community Energy Wales
VSPG Housing
Description:
At VSPG Housing, we are dedicated to providing quality housing solutions while working closely with local authorities. Our mission is to help house individuals and families into suitable accommodation, contributing to the solution of the current homelessness crisis.

What We Offer
We specialise in Guaranteed Rent Schemes, designed to provide landlords in Greater Manchester with a hassle-free rental experience. Our comprehensive services ensure that property owners receive a reliable income, even when their properties are unoccupied. Our Guaranteed Rental Schemes Include the following:

•	Guaranteed Rent: We provide landlords with a guaranteed monthly rental income, regardless of whether the property is tenanted.
•	Long-Term Security: Enjoy the peace of mind with a guaranteed rent for up to 5 years.
•	Maintenance and Repairs: All maintenance and repair costs are covered by us, ensuring your property remains in excellent condition without additional expense to you.
•	Competitive Rates: We offer competitive rental rates to ensure you receive the best possible income from your property.
•	Hassle-Free Management: We handle all aspects of property management, making it a seamless and stress-free experience for landlords.
•	Cash Purchases: We buy houses for cash, providing quick and efficient solutions for property owners looking to sell.

Our Mission
Our ambition at VSPG Housing is to contribute significantly to solving the homelessness crisis. By partnering with local authorities and offering reliable housing solutions, we aim to make a positive impact on our community.

Contact Us
To learn more about our Guaranteed Rental Schemes and how we can help you, please visit our website or contact us today. Let VSPG Housing provide you with the peace of mind and reliable income you deserve.

Name: Integra Developments
Description: At Integra Developments, we specialize in strategic capital raising to unlock the full potential of underutilized lots across Southern Ontario. By combining smart design, efficient approvals, and turnkey development, we transform properties into thriving, income-generating assets — with a focus on the Niagara Region and Southern Ontario.

Name: GREENATION
Description:
Greenation SAS est une société d'ingénerie et de conseil en développement durable.

Spécialisés en Eco-construction, en Impact Environnemental et en Responsabilité sociale, nous vous accompagnons pour mener à bien vos projets durables.

Par ailleurs les experts Greenation sont habilités à réaliser le Bilan carbone de l'ADEME et sont certifiés SA8000.

Name: OPL Projects
Description:
OPL Projects, a division of Ocean Pacific Lighting Inc. is an established, family-owned architectural lighting distributor head quartered in Vancouver, Canada and Los Angeles, United States.

We are known throughout the industry as the leading provider of lighting solutions representing high-quality, manufacturers from North America, Europe, and our factory partners in Asia. Our focus is on high-quality and cost effectiveness.

Our team of lighting professionals are known to be passionately committed to cater to our clients, from the very initial stages of concept and design development, through product selection, specification support and project management.

Our office, located in the heart the Morgan Creek, is a working studio intended to showcase an array of functional and innovative commercial lighting solutions and controls. We welcome consumers and members of the architectural and design industry to explore curated vignettes of architectural and decorative lighting, showcased in the context of live working space.

Name: 548 Enterprise
Description:
The 548 Enterprise philosophy is to redevelop metropolitan communities by utilizing renewable and sustainable technologies, allowing us to create savings for families, lower environmental impact, and drive value for the community.

548 Enterprise is aiming high with attainable stretch goals for units built, lowering carbon emissions, putting an end to sky-high utility bills for tenants, and creating the first investment fund in the country to focus on community solar and sustainable, affordable housing.

In 2022, 548 combined it’s various entities under 548 Enterprise, allowing it to have an even more expansive reach and cultivate opportunities for partners, residents, investors, and communities at large. Learn more at 548enterprise.com

Name: Axis Residential
Description:
Axis Residential is an owner-managed property management organization focused on our Active Adult & Market Rate Multifamily Housing Brands. Because we are owner-managed, we have a non-traditional approach to Property Management. Our primary focus is on the success of our employees and creating the best communities for our residents.

Operating in 28 communities, throughout seven states, we are consistently developing properties in new markets where there is a clear lack of quality apartments.

Our goal is to better serve our employees by creating an environment for both personal and professional growth. We employ an efficient staffing model that calls for the active participation of our residents to create an environment that promotes community and purpose. 

Together, alongside our residents, we achieve more.

Name: Mahajaya Properties
Description: Established since 1970 by our founder, Dato’ Tan Leong Min, Mahajaya has grown, succeeded and served through three generations, all because of our key philosophy – to always put innovation, quality and people first. We are known for our sustainable lifestyle projects which incorporate stylish modern living with solid practicality. Our main purpose is to realise your dream and your goals through our people, products and services.

Name: Orange Keys
Description:
Welkom bij Orange Keys, het innovatieve bedrijf opgericht door drie gedreven ondernemers. Wij zijn gespecialiseerd in het uitponden en converteren van vastgoedportefeuilles. Daarnaast kunnen wij effectieve deals sourcen in zowel het Verenigd Koninkrijk, Nederland en de Spaanse Costa's.

Onze expertise reikt verder dan alleen vastgoedbeheer; we zijn ervaren in het opzetten van HMO's en beschikken over een betrouwbaar netwerk in de UK voor renovaties en beheer. De mogelijkheden die wij bieden zijn divers, en onze voorkeur gaat uit naar het opzetten van joint ventures om gezamenlijk onze vastgoedportefeuilles te laten groeien.

Bij Orange Keys geloven we in de kracht van samenwerking en innovatie om duurzame groei en succes te realiseren. Laat ons samen de sleutel vinden tot uw vastgoedambities.

Name: Association of Directors of Housing (ADoH)
Description: Association of Directors of Housing - for directors working in local government on housing and homelessness.

Name: Opportunity Communities, LLC
Description: Through Opportunity Communities, community development non-profits leverage their combined resources to create administrative support and programmatic capacity in areas that benefit from scale and expertise.  Control and governance remains local, guiding strategic direction, local programs, budget and assets. Without sacrificing local control, OppCo achieves a more sustainable, efficient and robust structure for community development activities to support stronger families, greater economic equality, and thriving communities that benefit all people.  OppCo was launched in April 2018 by two experienced Greater Boston non-profits--Nuestra Comunidad and The Neighborhood Developers. In 2022, the North Shore CDC joined as our third member.  Across the three organizations is a housing portfolio of 1,863 apartments, providing a stable home to over 3,780 low- and moderate-income individuals. Over time, as OppCo expands its membership, it expects to manage tenant services and asset management of 10,000 affordable homes and to support its members to diversify and accelerate their affordable housing production.

Name: Merthyr Valleys Homes
Description:
Merthyr Valleys Homes (MVH) was established in 2009 as a result of tenants voting to transfer their homes to a new not-for-profit organisation. We own and manage over 4,200 homes across the borough.
On 1st May 2016 we became Wales’ first tenant and employee mutual housing association. Allowing our tenants and employees to become Members gives them a share in the organisation and allows them the right to cast their vote. Our tenants and employees are empowered to get involved and have a real say, and they influence the decision making and set the direction for MVH.

Name: Providence Development, LLC
Description: Providence Development is a real estate investment, development, and operating company dedicated to consistent profitable expansion in high growth destination markets in the greater Rocky Mountain region.

Name: PT Sentul City Tbk.
Description:
Sentul City is located in the fast growing area in the South of Jakarta situated at Sentul, Babakan Madang, Bogor Regency, in West Java, Indonesia.

Sentul City has successfully developed to become a fully integrated township with its area of more than 3100 hectares with 1250 hectares fully functioning and optimal being an established township with its complete infrastructure, public facilities, commercial facilities, healthcare facilities, education facilities, township management, and more than 10.000 homes occupied.

Moreover, Sentul City has the most incomparable combination of modern township infrastructure & facilities and beautiful-natural riches of magnificent hills, green valleys, lively rivers, magical lakes, breath-taking waterfalls, world-class hot-spring water, mountains view and other tourism attractions.

In addition, the fact that Sentul City-Jonggol area is the center of gravity of the biggest regional development in the country, in the midst of Jakarta-Bogor, Jakarta-Cikampek, Jakarta-Puncak and Jakarta-Bandung axes. This is clearly the spatial competitive advantages of Sentul City. It’ll be the center of regional development in Indonesia. This regional infrastructure development has been planned and started since early 1970s, its still continuing in a faster than ever speed and it’ll still continue going forward. Sentul City is at center of Indonesian developing economy.

Name: Lakeview Development
Description:
El Hazek first entered the market in 1979 as a construction company, with the goal of becoming a strong competitive player in the industry. After steadily building its name and track record, the company began expanding its capabilities and looking at new opportunities in 1995. Striving to foster a family of culture by creating a scene that encourages the general well-being and growth of each member within our communities.

Lakeview Development has redefined the scope of a luxurious lifestyle living. Our projects are centered to introduce an unparalleled experience for every household; bridging the importance of family with the ambitions for career growth. Lakeview Development begins a journey surrounded by an architecture of landscapes and water features to instill a tranquil atmosphere. 

Lakeview Development is proud to announce a new project launching soon.

Name: Renovare Development
Description: Renovare Development applies a unique approach to development that includes intense collaboration with municipal partners and strategic leveraging of local, state and federal incentives and funding programs to minimize long-term debt and ensure sustainable cash flow.  Our approach includes a deep commitment to building quality teams that will ensure each project is completed on time and within budget.  Our developments are inclusive and provide comprehensive solutions for affordable housing and economic development to local communities.

Name: Vero Sade
Description:
Vero Sade is building lifestyles for a new generation. We exist to rethink every step of the development process, community and club experiences that transform the traditional residential model.

We’re a vertically integrated owner-operator with over 40 multifamily realizations averaging a gross IRR and equity multiple of 27% and 1.8x.

Name: NT Shelter
Description: NT Shelter’s work, as the peak body for affordable housing and homelessness, involves research and policy development, advocacy and communications, sector consultation and coordination, and capacity building. We represent and promote the important work and interests of our members across the affordable housing and homelessness sector with a view to achieving better outcomes for Territorians without access to appropriate and affordable housing.

Name: Housing Forward
Description: Housing Forward exists to support the preservation and expansion of housing, particularly affordable housing, throughout the City of Tulsa and Tulsa County, ensuring a housing ecosystem that facilitates equitable access to safe, affordable housing for all. Our mission is to be the leading resource for housing development through systems transformation, policy and resource alignment, and innovative partnerships. Through data-informed education and advocacy initiatives, Housing Forward will amplify the importance of housing affordability and support the policies, programs and initiatives that promote the increased supply of affordable, workforce and mixed-income housing opportunities throughout the region.

Name: Tulou
Description: Tulou is a built-to-rent operator developing housing formats that offer an ecosystem of services, spaces and activities designed around human inner needs. Tulou’s inspiring living experience is made possible by shared spaces and proprietary technology that enable a collaborative and reciprocal lifestyle within the communities of residents.

Name: SEMAC
Description: La SEMAC (Société d’Économie Mixte d'Aménagement et de Construction) a été créée en 1991 afin de prendre une part active dans le développement du territoire Est de La Réunion. Ses deux missions principales sont de proposer aux familles des logements adaptés et d’aménager les territoires.

Name: Apartment Management & Maintenance Group
Description:
The Official Apartment Management and Maintenance Support Group started in 2015 on Facebook as a way for Multifamily professionals to ask questions and network with others in the industry. Since then we have grown to over 52,000 Multifamily members from coast to coast and around the world. We are now on LinkedIn and are glad you joined us. If you’re not a part of our Facebook group click the link below and welcome again!

https://www.facebook.com/groups/1496442263924775/?ref=share

Name: Phipps Houses
Description: Phipps Houses is New York City's oldest and largest not-for-profit developer, owner and manager of affordable housing.

Name: Observatori Metropolità de l'Habitatge de Barcelona
Description: L’Observatori Metropolità de l’Habitatge de Barcelona (O-HB) és un instrument supramunicipal dedicat a la recerca i l’anàlisi de dades relacionades amb l’habitatge. La seva finalitat és donar suport al disseny i avaluació de les polítiques públiques.

Name: Faith-Based Housing Initiative
Description: We train faith-based groups to develop places that foster community through housing. Follow our blog at https://fbhi.substack.com/

Name: Paramount Disability Homes
Description: Paramount Disability Homes specialises in the management of Specialist Disability Accommodation (SDA) properties for individuals with high support needs. We are committed to providing accessible, purpose-built homes that enhance independence, comfort, and security for every participant.

Name: Bostadsrätterna
Description:
Bostadsrätterna är en rikstäckande service - och intresseorganisation för Sveriges bostadsrättsföreningar. Idag är cirka 10 000 bostadsrättsföreningar medlemmar i Bostadsrätterna. Vi bildades 1921 och är därmed Sveriges äldsta bostadsrättsorganisation. 

Genom ett medlemskap hos Bostadsrätterna får styrelsen i din bostadsrättsförening rådgivning inom juridik, teknik, ekonomi och tillgång till ett stort utbud av utbildningar samt en rad andra förmåner.

Vad ingår i medlemskapet?
- Styrelserådgivning via telefon och e-post.
- Styrelsetidningen Bostadsrätterna Direkt, tio gånger per år
- Alla medlemmar i föreningen får boendetidningen
   Din Bostadsrätt fyra gånger per år.
- Föreningen får egen webbplats via Bostadsrätternas publiceringsverktyg.
- Kostnadsfria kurser i Bostadsrättsskolan.
- Bostadsrätternas stadgemall, blanketter för avtal, ansökningar och annat som 
  behövs i föreningen.
- Fina medlemsrabatter på bl.a fastighetsförsäkring, tvättstugeutrustning, 
  underhållsplan, säkerhetsdörrar och mycket mer.    

Testa oss kostnadsfritt!

Name: Pavilion by Rams
Description: Pavilion Erbil commenced construction in early 2022 and transforms more than 170 hectares of land into a luxurious residential and commercial district with one of the world's largest artificial lagoons and shopping malls in the Middle East.

Name: Winvestor Developments
Description:
It is an Egyptian-Saudi joint stock company between IMS Development and Project Management and
Al-Manawer Contracting Company in Saudi Arabia.
The company has a strong and huge precedent in Saudi Arabia and Egypt, where Al-Manawer Company has cooperated with the government in the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia
Saudi Arabia has established and completed a large number of government projects with the Ministry of Endowments, which are mosques affiliated to the Ministry in different locations and
Also with the Ministry of Education in establishing a number of government schools. charities,
In addition to cooperating with the Ministry of Interior in establishing police stations and prisons
The Kingdom of Saudi Arabia and housing projects in the Arab Republic of Egypt, especially in New Cairo.
Within the framework of Winvstor aspirations through studying and analyzing the urban expansion of fourth generation cities and other distinctive areas, it has
The company was chosen to participate in the urban expansion in the Arab Republic of Egypt for the new areas

Name: Torteltuin
Description:
De Torteltuin is een Amsterdamse wooncoöperatie georganiseerd rondom de principes van de permacultuur, toegepast op de sociale en stedelijke omgeving.

Een volhardend huishouden, dat is de Torteltuin. Een groep mensen die zich verenigt in een wooncoöperatie, omdat ze dat waarin ze geloven, waar willen maken. Wij geloven in de wooncoöperatie als de toekomst van de stad.

De Torteltuin is de woontoekomst van de stad. Die toekomst er niet een van vervuilend beton, anonieme hoogbouw en speculerende beleggers. Nee, de nieuwe huizen van de stad zijn duurzaam, sociaal en betaalbaar. Deze drie peilers brengt de Torteltuin in de praktijk vanuit het gedachtegoed van de 'permacultuur'. Dit staat voor de kunst om met de natuurlijke tendens van een systeem mee te denken, in plaats van er tegen in. Complexe ecosystemen dienen als voorbeeld voor het ontwerpen van de menselijke leefomgeving op een manier die ecologisch duurzaam en economisch stabiel is.

Name: Coalition for a Better Acre
Description:
Coalition for a Better Acre (CBA) is a membership-based community development corporation dedicated to resident empowerment and sustainable community revitalization for current and future residents of Lowell and the Merrimack Valley. Visit www.cbacre.org to learn about our work and how to get involved.

As a community development corporation (CDC), CBA is a professional, not-for-profit organization providing economic development, real estate development, and resident empowerment to promote and support our community and region.

Name: ReBUILD Metro
Description: ReBUILD Metro is a community change organization that revitalizes historically redlined neighborhoods of East Baltimore without displacing their legacy residents. Since launching in 2006, we have grown from a community-driven concept for solving the Oliver neighborhood’s abandonment crisis into Baltimore’s largest nonprofit developer and manager of scattered-site housing for low-to-moderate-income families. Since 2008, we have rebuilt over 200 abandoned properties into new homeownership and rental housing opportunities and have created a total of over 420 mixed-income housing units in East Baltimore, along with several new storefronts and community greenspaces. As a result of our reinvestments, two formerly distressed East Baltimore neighborhoods have together experienced an 85% reduction in vacancy, a 30% rise in population, a 60% increase in homeownership, and a 50% reduction in homicides without experiencing any displacement.

Name: The Dorcol Residence
Description:
The Dorcol Residence, na uglu ulica Dunavska i Knežopoljska, u Dorćolu u Beogradu.

Projekat obuhvata 459 stambenih jedinica, od garsonjera od 33 m² do penthausa površine preko 200 m². U ponudi će biti i 27 predsedničkih apartmana, 37 lokala za prodavnice, kafe-barove i restorane, kao i više od 800 parking mesta raspoređenih na tri podzemna nivoa. Izgradnja će se odvijati u dve faze, a završetak celokupnog projekta planiran je za 2029. godinu.

The Dorcol Residence se nalazi u neposrednoj blizini Kalemegdanske tvrđave, Dunavskog keja i Trga republike, i ima direktan pristup Linijskom parku, investiciji vrednoj 100 miliona evra koja obuhvata 10 hektara uređenih površina, pet trgova i mrežu od pet kilometara pešačkih i biciklističkih staza.

Projekat je razvijen u saradnji sa londonskim studiom MAWD | March and White Design, međunarodno priznatim arhitektonskim i dizajnerskim biroom.

Zgrade odlikuju bronzirani detalji, kaskadne terase i zaobljene konture koje prate duh Dunava. Staklene površine od poda do plafona pružaju poglede na Dunav i Linijski park, čineći ovaj pejzaž sastavnim delom svakodnevnog života. Enterijeri su zamišljeni kao spoj dorćolskog nasleđa i savremenih standarda stanovanja.

Sa direktnim pristupom Linijskom parku, stanari će moći da šetaju, voze bicikl i provode vreme na otvorenom kao deo svojih dnevnih rutina, dok će kafe-barovi, restorani i prodavnice u prizemlju predstavljati nova mesta susreta, kako za stanovnike, tako i za posetioce.

U skladu sa visokim ekološkim standardima, projekat uključuje energetski efikasne sisteme, trostruku stolariju, održive materijale i pametnu zgradu sa naprednim tehnologijama.

Name: Kolodom mobile homes
Description:
Kolodom is a Slovak producer of timeless mobile and modular homes.

We are civil engineers and architects, who designed mobile homes and are still innovating design of Kolodom.
We take the environment into account and mainly use ECO FRIENDLY materials for our Kolodoms, from the wooden supporting structure, windows, exterior and interior cladding to thermal insulation. We care about the quality and durability of mobile homes.
Kolodoms are wooden mobile homes on wheels. The advantage is that you can combine several models together to create one large family home. They are intended for housing intended for families with children or individuals for year-round housing. In addition to ordinary living, Kolodom is also used for business, for rent, or for camping, by the sea or as a recreational cottage. It is up to you what use your Kolodom will serve.

We import to the whole of Europe and that is why we have our dealers in the Czech Republic, Germany and Switzerland.

https://www.kolodom.com/

Name: Lambton Park
Description:
Lambton Estate is one of County Durham’s ‘hidden gems’ containing both nationally and regionally important heritage assets. It has historically been associated with coal mining and hosted a lion park in the latter part of the 20th Century but until recently it has been an exclusive Estate with very limited public access. 

The Trustees of Lord Durham’s 1989 Voluntary Settlement obtained outline planning permission in 2016 for an exciting new development and since then, six phases of development have commenced on the Estate. These have been designed by Estate in close collaboration with their delivery partner, their trusted design team and the builders delivering the developments on the ground.

The design team and housebuilders currently delivering on site include:

Miller Homes - Rectory Green and Bowes Gate Drive
Bellway Homes - Hedworths Green Robertson Homes - Lionfields
Brims- Bowes Gate Commercial

MGL - Chesters self build civils

Your Trusted Partner in Government Contract Solutions

At Bridge Point Management Solutions (BPMS), we specialize in securing and managing government lease agreements for property owners, offering a reliable and hassle-free way to maximize rental income. Our expertise lies in facilitating long-term contracts with government agencies, ensuring guaranteed above-market rental returns for up to three years.

We provide a comprehensive property management solution, conducting regular monthly inspections and maintaining properties to the highest standards. Our commitment is to return properties in their original condition, giving owners complete peace of mind.

Why Partner with BPMS?
 Guaranteed Above-Market Rent – Secure long-term, stable income with government-backed agreements.
 Reliable Contract Terms – Enjoy the security of fixed-term contracts with guaranteed payments.
 Proactive Property Management – Monthly inspections and diligent oversight to protect your investment.
 Risk-Free Leasing – No tenant management worries—just consistent returns and professional service.
 Government Partnerships – Leverage our experience in securing and managing government contracts.

At BPMS, we take pride in delivering tailored solutions that align with your investment goals while ensuring compliance and quality at every stage.

Let’s connect to explore how BPMS can help you maximize your property’s potential.

die vielfältige Bausubstanz unserer geschichtsträchtigen Stadt und prägen dadurch das Freiberger Stadtbild entscheidend mit.

ständig das Wohnumfeld unserer Immobilien und legen dabei größten Wert darauf, allen Mietern ein schönes Wohnumfeld zu schaffen – egal in welcher Lebensphase.

Name: Benedict Homes
Description:
At Benedict Community Housing, we believe that no military veteran should face homelessness after serving their country. We are a well-funded, visionary organization with a single, powerful mission: to provide secure, sustainable, and dignified housing solutions for those who have served in the Armed Forces and now need a place to call home.

With a commitment to long-term impact, we go beyond just offering shelter—we provide stability, support, and a pathway to independence. Our innovative approach integrates high-quality housing with tailored rehabilitation, employment opportunities, and mental health support, ensuring that every veteran we serve has the foundation to rebuild their future.

Backed by institutional investors, government partnerships, and private sector support, Benedict Community Housing is leading the charge in eradicating veteran homelessness across the UK. Through strategic development, cutting-edge housing models, and a deep-rooted respect for those who served, we are transforming lives, one home at a time.

Join us in our mission to end veteran homelessness for good.

Our journey is one of redefining aging, acknowledging a vital truth: research shows that mature women are often wrongly diagnosed with mental illness, a consequence of societal neglect. Our mission extends beyond support; it's about tackling the roots of loneliness, depression, fear, and anxiety, often stemming from insufficient communication skills, self-advocacy and lack of connection.
At The Golden Life Community LLC, we are dedicated to creating spaces, both virtual and physical, where women over 55 can rediscover their voices and advocate for themselves in an environment of support and understanding. Our connection collective offers a dual solution - a dynamic virtual platform for global connection and welcoming physical spaces for enriching, real-world interactions. #GOLDENconnections #GOLDENSpaces

Name: KDM Development
Description:
KDM Development began in 1995 by 3 individuals interested in the acquisition of manufactured home communities. KDM and affiliated entities presently manage over 52 properties multi-state.

KDM is a “hands-on” full-service property management company, specializing in the management of manufactured home communities and apartments. Our goal is to provide clean, attractive and affordable places for our residents to live. By consistent application of guidelines, our management team strives to maintain the properties to be competitive with other forms of housing and to maintain the value of the residents’ individual homes by maintaining the park as a whole. Name: LEGACY GROUP
Description: Legacy’s experience, expertise, track record, relationships, vision, and presence gives The Company a unique ability and opportunities to acquire vast amounts of Florida land in the markets we believe will continue to grow exponentially in the future. Our focus is on potentially iconic properties in these pathways of progress that can be approved for at least 1000 units of predictable, allowed residential and compatible commercial uses and other marketable uses, such as waterfront amenities, that will present an attractive story and demand. We judge this by analyzing the present zoning, land use plan, code provisions, such as density and height allowed, surrounding property, topography, property conditions, location, access, availability of services, market conditions, nature, and attitudes of the surrounding populations, local history, trending issues, and other applicable factors. We normally have an excellent Market Analysis done as well. Utilizing this data and our own knowledge, we work with the local governments to produce a result that is excellent for us, our partners, and the communities we work in.

At Bright Communities we are committed to a bold mission: to shape the landscape of tomorrow by designing, developing, and nurturing communities that emphasize eco-friendly practices, healthy lifestyles, and a strong sense of connection. Our purpose is rooted in the belief that any piece of land (no matter how small) holds the potential to foster thriving neighborhoods and a healthier planet. We believe that every Bright community can set the foundation for a brighter, greener, and more connected world.

Our expertise in Development Management centers around projects that champion social welfare, including affordable housing initiatives, community centers, and the provision of essential community services. We manage development projects with proven best practices enhanced through creativity and passion, producing impressive returns for project partners while positively impacting the communities we work in.

Our team brings decades of experience designing and developing communities across Western Canada. At Bright, we cherish our role in shaping the neighbourhoods that you call home.

Name: Impact Residential Development
Description:
Impact Residential Development is funded by the private family office of Barry Sternlicht, the CEO and founder of Starwood Capital Group. Founded in 1991, Starwood is a global investment leader in real estate, with offices in more than 20 countries and over $125 billion of assets under management.

Under Mr. Sternlicht’s leadership, Starwood has made a long-term commitment to investing in the affordable housing sector, with more than 47,000 affordable units currently owned and operated across 246 communities in 24 states. According to Affordable Housing Finance, Starwood was the second largest owner of affordable housing in the country through year-end 2021. Starwood’s in-house property management firm, Highmark Residential, manages the majority of this portfolio and will provide third party operational and compliance expertise for Impact.

Impact Residential was formed to further Mr. Sternlicht’s mission to help solve the nation’s affordable housing crises by providing high quality new supply, where and for whom it is needed most. In building a purpose-built team of experts in multifamily design, construction, and tax credit financing, he has committed to developing a nationwide, long term portfolio from the ground up. Impact is truly a mission-driven enterprise, with a commitment from Mr. Sternlicht to contribute a portion of all project development fees toward his private charitable foundation.

Name: Bando Investment Group LTD
Description:
Bando Investment Group is a boutique property development firm specializing in luxury residential real estate. 

Founded in 2018, the vision of the company has always been to provide the highest quality homes in the market at competitive prices. All of our homes feature innovative architectural designs along with high end interior and exterior finishes, making them one-of-a-kind homes that any family will cherish for a lifetime.

Our company is well on its way to becoming a prominent force in the real estate sector of the United States. With our superior products being offered at competitive prices and our 5 star rated customer service, it is no surprise as to why we stand out from the pack.

Name: Housing Authority of the City of Goldsboro, NC
Description:
The Housing Authority of the City of Goldsboro is a High Performing Public Housing Agency located in Goldsboro, North Carolina. Under the direction of Mr. Anthony Goodson, Jr. the Housing Authority has become a leading provider of resident services and property management in Wayne County. In addition to providing decent, safe, and sanitary housing, HACG focuses on personal responsibility, upward mobility, fiscal responsibility, and programmatic integrity with a daily challenge of Brightening Spirits to Regain Optimism. We believe that housing is an integral part of providing opportunities for all. 

HACG currently provides services through up to 1225 public housing units and 237 Housing Choice Vouchers/Section 8 Vouchers. HACG also administers several special use voucher programs, including 27 VASH vouchers to serve veterans and 20 Mainstream Vouchers for those at risk of homelessness. We have 9 main public housing sites on over 180 acres which include Fairview Homes, Trinity Court, Lincoln Homes, Walnut Street School Apartments, Elmwood Terrace, Woodcrest, Little Washington, West Haven Apartments, and our newest renovation project, Park Court Apartments which is slated to be a Gold level LEED-certified project.

As an innovative agency that puts residents first, HACG has many grant and community programs to assist its residents in achieving self-sufficiency. Our award-winning resident-services staff members have a true heart for service and are constantly thinking of new and different ways to help our clients.

HACG is truly a leader in its industry winning various awards for development, program creation, leadership, newsletters, risk mitigation, and community work.  We partner with many local agencies to enhance services, reduce silos, and are involved in national, state, and local industry groups. Never satisfied with the status quo, HACG goes above and beyond to find the best way to assist those in need and increase opportunities for affordable housing.

Name: Hepta Housing- هيبتا للإسكان
Description:
تُعد شركة هيبتا للإسكان إحدى الشركات التابعة لمجموعة هيبتا المتواجدة في كلٍّ من الأردن والإمارات العربية المتحدة، وقد تأسست برؤية قائمة على الدمج بين الفخامة العصرية، الجودة الهندسية، والموثوقية التي اكتسبتها المجموعة عبر سنوات طويلة من الخبرة في قطاع التطوير العقاري. تعمل الشركة على تقديم مشاريع سكنية مميزة في عمّان – الأردن، تتميز بتصاميم عالمية، وتشطيبات عالية المستوى، وحلول ذكية تلائم متطلبات العائلات الحديثة.

Hepta Housing is one of the leading companies under the Hepta Group, operating in both Jordan and the UAE. Established with a vision to seamlessly merge modern elegance, engineering excellence, and the high reliability that the group has cultivated through years of experience in real estate development, Hepta Housing delivers premium residential projects across Amman, Jordan. The company is distinguished by world-class architectural designs, superior finishing standards, and smart solutions tailored to meet the needs of contemporary families.

Name: OLEA Bouwen met Zorg
Description:
Hoe creëer je een leefomgeving die mensen met een zorgvraag écht ondersteunt - die het leven lichter, aangenamer en zelfstandiger maakt? Bij Olea begrijpen we dat elk project unieke wensen en eisen kent. Wij combineren technische expertise met een persoonlijke, warme aanpak.

We begeleiden zowel zorgorganisaties als particulieren bij nieuwbouw, verbouw, inrichting en facilitaire vraagstukken. Ook zijn wij gespecialiseerd in herstelgerichte projecten binnen de letselschade, waarbij een veilige en passende woonomgeving bijdraagt aan het herstel en welzijn van de cliënt.

ZORG EN WONEN VERANDERT - EN WIJ BEWEGEN MEE!
Er is een groeiende behoefte aan woonvormen waarin mensen met een zorgvraag zelfstandig kunnen wonen met zorg op maat. Van zorgstudio’s en -appartementen tot clusterwoningen met 24-uurszorg: Olea helpt deze leefomgevingen mogelijk te maken.

Ook bij particuliere woonoplossingen, zoals het (ver)bouwen of inrichten van een woning na een ongeval of ziekte, zijn wij een betrokken en deskundige partner. Samen met cliënten, belangenbehartigers en verzekeraars realiseren we duurzame oplossingen die het dagelijks leven direct verbeteren.

SCHAKEL TUSSEN TECHNIEK EN ZORG
Olea verbindt alle betrokken partijen: van aannemer tot zorgorganisatie, cliënten en verzekeraars. Wij spreken de taal van techniek én zorg, en zorgen ervoor dat iedereen op één lijn komt – met de gebruiker altijd centraal.

Onze dienstverlening rust op drie pijlers:

• Bouw & verbouw - van initiatief tot realisatie
• Interieur & design - gericht op comfort, functionaliteit en herstel
• Beheer & onderhoud - voor duurzame ondersteuning van het zorgproces

We kunnen een partner zijn in iedere fase. Of het nu gaat om een zorginstelling die uitbreidt, een woning die aangepast moet worden na letsel, of een facilitair proces dat beter moet presteren: we denken graag mee, nemen zorgen uit handen en realiseren omgevingen waarin mensen zich echt thuis voelen.

MEER WETEN?
We maken graag kennis!

S&D Administración de Fincas cuenta con un equipo de profesionales, con la formación y experiencia necesarias para buscar soluciones a sus necesidades de servicio integral de Comunidades de Propietarios. 

•	Área Jurídica: Mediación y Asesoramiento en conflictos entre comuneros, Gestión de incidencias, Control de la morosidad, Cumplimiento de normativas legislativas.

•	Área Técnica: Gestión de obras (petición de ofertas, comparativo de proveedores), Tramitación y seguimiento de siniestros, Asesoramiento técnico (Informe de Evaluación del Edificio, Inspecciones Obligatorias de las Instalaciones, …).

•	Área Económica: Gestión administrativa (control del flujo de caja, actualización mensual de cuentas), Renegociación de los contratos de suministros y servicios, Atención al cliente.

La variedad de disciplinas, la cualificación de nuestro personal y nuestra amplia experiencia, nos permite atender los requerimientos de la Comunidad de Propietarios de forma efectiva y transparente. 

Además ofrecemos la posibilidad de contratar otros servicios adicionales como auditoría de cuentas de años anteriores a la contratación del servicio con S&D Administración de Fincas, presentación de impuestos ante la Agencia Estatal de Administración Tributaria, certificados de deuda para venta de inmuebles, tramitación de subvenciones, vigilancia de las notificaciones electrónicas, prevención de riesgos laborales, protección de datos, etc.

Name: South East Homelessness Forum
Description:
SEHF was founded over 20 years ago to develop a regional homelessness strategy and build cross sector collaboration to reduce homelessness. 

In 2008 when regional government ended, it grew in strength, bringing together Local Authorities, charitable and housing providers, government advisers and national organisations such as Homeless Link. 

At its heart is a “coalition of the willing” of homelessness professionals passionate about homelessness who hold an event 2 to 3 times a year to be updated on best practice and debate current issues and development.

Name: Community Foundations
Description:
The UK is facing a housing emergency. The current system is failing the very people it is meant to support, leaving millions without access to secure, affordable homes. The social consequences of this crisis will be felt for generations.

At Community Foundations, we believe no single solution - and no party in isolation - can solve this challenge. Only through meaningful collaboration can we tackle the crisis head‑on and create lasting change.

Community Foundations is an independent social & affordable housing platform offering a trusted public private partnership in expertise and experience, to develop the infrastructure essential in delivery of the strategic housing objectives of local authorities and private registered providers. 

Drawing on the collective experience of our Leadership Team, Advisory Panel, and external stakeholders, we take a holistic approach - from strategy through to delivery. Our goal is simple: to create housing solutions that strengthen communities and deliver lasting social impact.

Description: Jaycees Brantford Non-Profit Homes Corp. is a housing provider with a specific focus on providing affordable housing to families. Name: Living Rent
Description:
Living Rent is Scotland's tenants and community union.

We are a mass-membership union of tenants, carers, workers and residents, rooted in working-class struggle. We organise collectively to build the power to secure material improvements to our daily lives and put power back where it belongs: in the hands of ordinary people. 

We build this power to fight for better rights and better protections against rent increases, evictions, lack of public services, high energy bills, pollution and poor-quality housing.  We know our current political system is failing ordinary people and we refuse to wait for politicians or charities to change things for the better.

Name: Dallas Community Land Trust
Description:
Dallas Community Land Trust (DCLT) is building a Dallas where families can thrive in homes they can afford. We acquire and steward land to preserve affordability, stabilize neighborhoods, and create pathways to wealth generation for families earning 50%–80% of the Area Median Income (AMI).

Our model balances individual opportunity with community stewardship: homeowners build equity while affordability is preserved for future generations. This ensures that neighborhoods remain accessible, vibrant, and inclusive, even as market pressures rise.

DCLT acquires vacant homes and vacant land, and partners with developers to infill and redevelop neighborhoods. By collaborating with developers, we increase the supply of affordable homes while embedding long‑term affordability covenants that protect families from displacement.

Through strategic land acquisition and long‑term affordability agreements, we are creating a replicable model for equitable development. Our work is not only about housing—it’s about stabilizing communities, preventing displacement, and building a stronger Dallas for generations to come.

Name: CLT Rezult
Description:
СLT REZULT is the first and the only Ukrainian manufacturer of Cross-Laminated Timber panels CLT (Cross-Laminated Timber). CLT is a solid wooden panel that consists of cross-linked layers of wood.
CLT is a unique building material that confidently competes with steel and concrete. It is ecologically clean and energy-efficient, with high strength and stiffness characteristics. This is the next generation and global trend in the design and building of single-story and multi-story constructions made of natural wood.
Rezult is one of the largest woodworking holdings in Eastern Europe that is listed in the TOP 10.
There is a full-cycle production facility located in the city of Korosten, Ukraine. The industrial park covers 200 hectares and has a production facility capacity of 1.2 million cubic meters of wood per year. The output capacity of CLT panels is 90 thousand m3 per year.
CLT advantages are:
- ecological compatibility - reduction and conservation of CO2 emissions, healthy microclimate
- due to the transverse structure of the longitudinal and transverse strips, CLT panels are non-shrinkable
 dried wood with a moisture content of 12% (+/- 2%) excludes infection with pests and fungi
- energy saving: low natural thermal conductivity (0.13 W/mK) and high heat capacity (2.1 kJ/kg)
- fire resistance - from 60 to 120 minutes
 reduction of period of finishing work - the panels are ready for interior decoration
- 4 times lighter than concrete structures
- used for multi-storey constructions
- space saving due to wall thickness
- implementation of complex architectural solutions
 guaranteed shelf life is over 50 years
- high sound absorption
- (PUR) - one-component polyurethane adhesive without formaldehydes
CLT panel size is up to 18 m x 3,5 m
Possible layers amount is 3, 5, 7 or 9 layers. Thickness varies from 60 to 360 mm.
Call us: +380504020050

From Sunshine Coast to South Australia, we’re building future-proof homes and investment properties with the backing of global giants Toyota and Panasonic.

Homecorp is proud to be owned by Prime Life Technologies, a company incorporated by global giants Toyota and Panasonic, with the intention of “changing the status quo in people’s lifestyles”.

 

The Prime Life Technologies subsidiaries include the globally recognised brands of Japanese builder Misawa Homes, Toyota Housing Corporation, Panasonic Homes Co. Ltd., Matsumura-Gumi Corporation, and Panasonic Construction Engineering Co. Ltd. This comprehensive network provides Homecorp with unparalleled stability and access to cutting-edge technologies.

 

Homecorp’s collaboration with Misawa Homes marks a significant milestone in Homecorp’s journey towards becoming a leading Developer and Builder nationwide. Renowned for innovative design and technological excellence, Misawa Homes has received the prestigious Good Design Award from the Japan Institute of Design Promotion for an impressive 34 consecutive years. With over 1.3 million homes built in Japan. Misawa Homes works directly with Homecorp to ensure seamless integration of their expertise and standards.

 

Through this strategic structure, Homecorp combines the strength and stability of Toyota and Panasonic with the innovative prowess of Misawa Homes, cementing its position as a trusted and forward-thinking Developer and Builder. with a shared passion for people, community, and continuous improvement, their collective expertise will deliver exceptional outcomes in the property development and construction industry.

 

Homecorp is committed to shaping communities and enhancing the standard of living across Australia. Our close collaboration with Misawa Homes provides a solid foundation for success in the ever-evolving development.

Name: Opportunity Home San Antonio
Description:
Since 1937, Opportunity Home San Antonio has committed more than 85 years to building and maintaining affordable housing for the residents of San Antonio. 

Opportunity Home provides housing assistance to more than 62,500 children, adults and seniors through its Public Housing, Housing Choice Voucher and Mixed-Income housing programs. The agency employs more than 600 individuals, with an annual operating budget of $200 million, and real estate assets valued at over $500 million. 

As a compassionate agency, we understand safe and quality affordable housing is the foundation to success, and we have the privilege of managing nearly 74 public housing communities, 36 other managed or owned communities and administering 13,789 rental vouchers throughout San Antonio. 

We are committed to creating dynamic communities where people thrive and hold themselves accountable to spur economic growth through the awarding of local contractors with housing development projects, obtaining real estate and administering rental subsides with private property owners. 

Opportunity Home is the stepping stone for many families who are working to become self-sufficient and ultimately achieve their dreams of homeownership, and we believe they can.

Name: GODSBANEN
Description:
*English below*

Godsbanen er byens kreative kraftcenter i den nye bydel Aarhus K. På Godsbanen kan du få realiseret drømme og projekter inden for design, kunst og kultur – uanset niveau. Er du kulturel iværksætter, designer eller kunstner kan du blive en del af stedets kreative fællesskab med enten en kontorplads eller et projektrum.
På Godsbanen kan du leje rum i alle afskygninger og størrelser på timebasis eller i længere tid; Gæstelejligheder, prøvelokaler, konferencefaciliteter, scenerum eller en stor, rå hal.

Godsbanens meget veludstyrede værksteder for tekstil, metal, lasercutter/3d-print, træ, form og grafisk arbejde er åbne for alle og du kan også købe ting herfra, i Salgsvognen i Foyeren. På Godsbanen kan du opleve mere end 500 arrangementer årligt – koncerter, udstillinger, forestillinger, markeder m.m. – og du kan nyde en god middag, en kop kaffe, eller bare kigge forbi og gå en tur på taget. Arkitekturen er et besøg værd i sig selv.

LÆS MERE PÅ Facebook.com/godsbanen // Godsbanen.dk

ENGLISH:

The Cultural Production Center Godsbanen is a creative powerhouse in the new city district of Aarhus; Aarhus K. If you are a cultural entrepreneur, designer or artist, you can become part of the creative community by renting an office space or a project room. At Godsbanen can you rent rooms in all shades and sizes on an hourly basis or for a longer time – e.g. guest apartments, conference facilities or our huge industrial hall; Rå Hal. 

In Godsbanen’s Open Workshops can you find expert guidance to help you make what your heart desires. You can work with a broad variety of materials and techniques - wood, textiles, metal, clay, leather, serigraphy, laser cutting and 3D print. At Godsbanen you can experience more than 500 events annually – concerts, exhibitions, performances, markets, festivals etc. Or you can enjoy a good dinner, a cup of coffee or take a walk on our rooftop – the architecture is worth a visit in itself.

LEARN MORE at godsbanen.dk

Name: mddl
Description:
mddl was founded with the goal of advancing scalable, efficient and sustainable middle housing forms within established neighbourhoods and promoting vibrant, walkable communities with more housing options to meet the diverse needs of Canadians.

As experienced developers, we had many ideas (too many ideas) about how to take our land development expertise to support a greater ecosystem in building more housing. Amidst the multitude of ideas, two core beliefs guided us:

1. We recognized that land development is historically shrouded in secrecy with little or no central area to find trusted information. We wanted to create transparency and visibility into this process, shedding light on the potential of middle housing for the entire ecosystem.

2. It takes a Community. We are passionate about helping to support people and having them support each other as they embark on their middle housing journey. We recognize that neither of us would have been able to accomplish half of what we have without the amazing and talented people we have had the privilege to work alongside and learn from.

Learn more about how we build capacity for municipalities, housing providers, industry and citizens: www.mddl.co

Name: ISHF - International Social Housing Festival
Description:
The 5th edition of the International Social Housing Festival, led by the Irish Council for Social Housing, Co-operative Housing Ireland, and Housing Europe, will take place on 4-6 June 2025 in Dublin, Ireland. 

The main theme of the Festival, "Storytelling," will centre on the experiences, ideas, and voices of all those engaged in housing—from public, cooperative, and social housing providers to tenants, policymakers, and advocates for inclusive homes and neighbourhoods.

ISHF has proven to be a great way to put a spotlight on the success stories that channel energy for the good of everyone and for decent housing for all.

The editions in Amsterdam (2017), Lyon (2019), Helsinki (2022), and Barcelona (2023) have moved the conversation away from numbers of ‘units’ towards communities and affordable, inclusive places to live.

Instead of only stressing what has gone wrong, these Festivals have mobilised activists, housing professionals, community groups, policymakers to focus on what society can gain by pushing for excellence in housing for people and the planet, bringing hope and creating synergies to put solutions in place for those households and individuals now stuck in limbo.

ISHF is an initiative by Housing Europe, the European Federation of Public, Cooperative and Social Housing, and its members and allies, present in 31 countries and encompassing 25 million dwellings, 11% of the housing stock in the European Union.

Name: Trinidad and Tobago Housing Development Corporation
Description:
The Trinidad and Tobago Housing Development Corporation (HDC) is an Agency of the Ministry of Housing and Urban Development. It was created by Act No. 24 of 2005 to replace the older National Housing Authority (NHA). The Act mandates the Corporation to provide affordable shelter and associated community facilities for low and middle-income persons and carry out the Government's broad policy with housing.

VISION
To be internationally recognised as a leader in providing innovative and affordable services and solutions for citizens of Trinidad and Tobago.
 
MISSION 
To expand the supply of affordable and quality rental home-ownership opportunities through building safe communities for the families we serve, thereby improving the quality of life for residents.
 
CORE VALUES
•Excellence – The HDC must go beyond doing its best. It must adhere to the highest standards in all aspects of its operations and demonstrate an ability to do so consistently.
 
•Respect – The HDC will work within the law and in keeping with its mandate to ensure that the rights of beneficiaries are respected, protected and fulfilled.
 
•Accountability – It is important for the HDC to protect the public interest and engender a sense of faith in its ability to fulfil its mandate.
 
•Integrity – In defining its standards and morals, the HDC makes a bold statement. It must work tirelessly to ensure that its operations reflect respect for rules and regulations and fairness in delivering services to beneficiaries.
 
•Compassion – The vulnerable groups which are targets of the HDC's operations must be treated with empathy and understanding. Their concerns must be seen as valid and addressed to achieve the best possible outcomes.

Name: Sydhavnen
Description:
Formålet med Foreningen Sydhavnen er at fremme bevarelsen og udviklingen af Slagteriet, Kulbroen og Gasværket på Sydhavnen i Aarhus som dynamisk udviklingsområde med lave huslejer og stor frihed til selv at forme lokalernes indretning og udformning. Foreningen varetager ikke enkelte medlemmers interesser, men arbejder for at hele området bevares til gavn for Aarhus som by, idet foreningen anser det som en vigtig del af en storby at kunne facilitere og møde de behov der findes hos nye og voksende iværksættere og de kreative producerende der har behov for et miljø hvor rammerne ikke er faste og forhåndsdefinerede, men kan præges og formes efter behov.

Foreningens medlemmer anser området som grobund for mange forskelligartede aktiviteter og er et miljø der er kultiveret igennem mere end 30 år, hvor kommunen (som udlejer) med minimale indgreb har udlejet lokalerne uden at definere en retning for området. Derved er der opstået et mangfoldigt miljø. I de seneste år er der opstået en voksende kultur for at samarbejde på tværs af brancher og benytte de mange kompetencer der findes i området. Dette styrker såvel små som store virksomheder, foreninger og institutioner. Det gavner Aarhus som by at der findes et stærkt miljø med gode rammer for vækst, udvikling og tværfaglige synergier, som samtidig tiltrækker kunder og besøgende fra hele verden.

Foreningens formål er i det daglige at 
•	lave lobbyarbejde for foreningens formål, 
•	være bindeled for eksterne interessenter, 
•	synliggøre områdets styrker og produktioner, 
•	styrke sammenhængskraften blandt områdets lejere
•	arbejde for at området i højere grad kan arrangere og facilitere offentlige arrangementer
