Name: New City Projects
Description:
New City Projects is one of the leading companies in the field of real estate development in Armenia. Having many years of experience and professional team, the company realizes not only private construction but also social investment projects.
«New city projects» puts quality and comfort above everything, that’s why all projects are entrusted to the best architectural studios and construction companies.

Name: Karibu Community Homes
Description: Karibu Community Homes was formed in April 2024 through the merger of Inquilab and Westway Housing Associations. Managing over 1,900 homes, Karibu combines decades of experience to deliver better services, invest more in homes, and amplify residents’ voices. With a strong leadership team and a focus on people, places, and partnership, we’re building a brighter future for our communities.

Name: Holmsø Boligresorts
Description: Holmsø Boligresorts er fremtidens boliger for målgruppen "aktive voksne 55+"

Name: CCL Consorzio Cooperative Lavoratori
Description: Nel 1974 nasce il Consorzio Cooperative Lavoratori, promosso dalle ACLI milanesi e dalla CISL Milano Metropoli e associato a Confcooperative Habitat. Oggi, attraverso 30 cooperative di abitazione sul territorio di Milano e provincia, offre un servizio affidabile in ogni fase: dalla ricerca della casa alla gestione del condominio. Insieme realizziamo alloggi in proprietà e in affitto sia in edilizia libera sia a canone agevolato e sociale con l’obiettivo di favorire relazioni virtuose tra gli abitanti e il quartiere, così da migliorare la qualità di vita dei nostri soci e dell’intera comunità.

Name: Bridge Housing Charitable Trust
Description:
Sustainable and Affordable Living. 
Bridge Housing Trust provides secure, long-term access to healthy homes at prices that are affordable for kiwi families. We create quality, low maintenance homes in developments that are specifically designed to foster a sense of community spirit.

Name: Cabinovo
Description:
Cabinovo is transforming urban living by delivering next-generation, design-led modular rental housing that accelerates gentle density and fosters sustainable communities across Canada.

We leverage advanced factory-based construction methods and streamlined design systems to deliver mid-rise housing at scale, faster, and with uncompromised quality or livability at every step.

Our collaborative approach brings together leading designers, engineers, and developers to revitalize existing neighbourhoods that are as thoughtful as they are efficient, withstanding another 100+ years. Through our work, Cabinovo is setting a new standard in housing development.

Discover how Cabinovo is reshaping the future of rental housing. Connect with us today.

Name: Tai Nuare - The Conscious Island
Description: At Tai Nuare, we're not just building a community – we're co-creating a blueprint for the future of conscious living. Our community is currently thriving online, connecting like-minded individuals and those seeking the energies of the island and community. Soon, it will expand into both physical and virtual forms, allowing us to bridge the gap between the physical and spiritual realms, and connect with kindred spirits around the globe becoming a sanctuary nestled in the pristine waters of the Caribbean.

Name: Cooperativa Prosper Lar
Description:
A Cooperativa Prosper Lar, fundada em 2019, está lançando o seu empreendimento em Peruíbe (SP): o "Residencial Portal do Sol" 

A nossa missão é oferecer moradia digna e acessível próxima à praia. Aqui, você pode conquistar o seu lar próprio através do autofinanciamento, ou seja, sem intermediação de banco, corretora ou órgão de proteção de crédito.

Somos entusiastas do cooperativismo e seguimos pesquisando e adotando as melhores práticas do segmento. Por isso, a Cooperativa Prosper Lar tem a honra de ser membro da Federação Nacional das Cooperativas Habitacionais (FenacoHAB). 

O "Residencial Portal do Sol" está localizado em um dos melhores pontos de Peruíbe, ao lado do portal de entrada da cidade e a 5 minutinhos da praia (carro ou ônibus). 

Reconhecida como estância turística prioritária pelo Governo do Estado de São Paulo, Peruíbe destaca-se como um dos municípios com mais áreas naturais (85 mil hectares de Mata Atlântica preservada e um dos ambientes marinhos mais protegidos de SP) e que valoriza o seu patrimônio cultural (Ruínas do Abarebebê, Lamário Municipal, Museu Histórico e Arqueológico de Peruíbe, Espaço Cultural Chico Latim, feiras de artesanato local).

Ficou curioso? Então dá uma olhada  nesta lista generosa de espaços e equipamentos que os moradores e visitantes vão poder desfrutar: 

 2 Dormitórios (sendo 1 suíte)
 Apto de 70m²
 Varanda Gourmet
 Vaga de Garagem + Depósito
 Lazer Completo
 Opção Duplex (cobertura 140m²)

 Piscina Adulto
 Piscina Infantil
Salões de Festas
Salões de Jogos
 Quadra Poliesportiva
 Quadra de Areia
 Espaço Fitness
 Play Kids
 Espaço Pet
 Jardim e Boulevard

Venha cooperar com a gente!

Name: الجهاز الوطني للتنمية
Description: تأسس الجهاز الوطني للتنمية في سنة 2024، كمؤسسة حكومية تهدف إلى تحقيق التنمية المستدامة في ليبيا. يسعى الجهاز إلى تحقيق هذا الهدف من خلال تنفيذ مشاريع استراتيجية لتطوير البنية التحتية ودعم القطاعات الاقتصادية وتنمية الموارد البشرية وتحسين مستوى الخدمات وتعزيز الاستثمار.

Name: Essex Housing Awards
Description:
The Essex Housing Awards (EHA) recognises high-quality developments, services and individuals from the public, private and voluntary sectors and promotes best practice across the county. 

This year there were 12 categories open to entry, focusing on developments of any size, design, partnership projects, action to tackle climate change, skills and much more.

Name: Service Disabled Veterans Oasis
Description:
Service Disabled Veteran Oasis is Washington, DC’s first non-profit commercial real estate development company owned and ran by Veterans.

It’s initiative, Oasis Renewal Project (ORP), specializes in providing extensive, specialized support and care to Veterans and others. We also provide staffing services in Healthcare, IT, Construction, Cybersecurity, and AI.

Name: ReHousing
Description: ReHousing is a non-profit focusing on supporting housing creation through applied research, consultation and education. Our website, ReHousing.ca empowers citizen developers in converting single-family homes into multi-unit housing.  As municipalities across Canada face the challenge of translating policy into more housing units, we bridge the gap between emerging policy initiatives and the housing creators they intend to serve.

Name: Seattle Social Housing
Description: Seattle Social Housing Developer (SSHD) is a public development authority that was created through the passage of I-135 in 2023. It is charged with building and acquiring high quality housing that is governed by its residents, permanently public, affordable and secure for people whose income level prices them out of traditional market-rate housing.

Name: RA Empire (Pvt) Ltd.
Description: RA Empire is a well-known real estate and marketing company that began its journey in 2011 in DHA Lahore under the leadership of Mr. Zubair Aslam Sheikh, a young entrepreneur. We've become one of Pakistan's most successful real estate firms, initially focusing on property transactions in DHA Lahore and various projects until 2018 when we started our own projects. Our goal is to provide affordable yet well-maintained properties, creating modern and beautiful communities where our customers can enjoy a luxurious lifestyle in a peaceful setting. We value our customers like family and aim to build trust with them. At RA Empire, we offer secure investment opportunities and affordable luxury living options.

Name: Adenium Living
Description:
Adenium Living works with participants to design and build homes that enable them to live the life they want, on their terms. Like our namesake, the resilient desert rose ‘Adenium’, these are homes where people can plant roots and flourish.

And we don’t just build specialist disability accommodation. We cultivate beautiful, practical homes for long-term living, incorporating custom features that meet the specific needs and desires of our participants. By listening and understanding those needs, we ensure a better living experience for every participant and the network of people who support them.

Engaging providers and participants early in the design process also means we can prepare the home for long term living, building and maintaining homes that are easily adaptable over time.

At Adenium Living, we don’t just provide somewhere to live; we provide somewhere to grow, thrive and belong, helping participants live better lives.

Name: Homelessness Queensland
Description: Homelessness QLD is a collaboration of homelessness services in Queensland (QLD). It was established as South Queensland Council to Homeless Persons (SQCHP) in 1996, became an incorporated association in 1997. It was renamed the Council to Homeless Persons QLD in in late 2017, and in 2022 changed to Homelessness QLD. HQ engages with the housing and SHS sectors across QLD and represents the Specialist Homelessness Services (SHS) sector as a peak body.

Name: PIMENTEL BTP
Description: Entreprise de gros-oeuvre et de bâtiment

Name: Habitat for Humanity of St. Joseph County
Description: Habitat for Humanity of St. Joseph County is a non-profit organization dedicated to eliminating sub-standard housing. Since 1987, we have served over 500 families with housing solutions programs and built over 220 affordable, quality- built homes for families in our community. People in our community and worldwide partner with Habitat for Humanity to build or improve a place they can call home. Habitat homeowners help build their own home alongside volunteers and pay an affordable mortgage. With our help, Habitat homeowners achieve the strength, stability, and independence they need to build a better life for themselves and their families.

Name: Aboriginal Housing Northern Territory (AHNT)
Description: Driving change and supporting self-determination through partnerships, collaboration, engagement and communication

Name: Viaduct Housing Partnership
Description:
We are Viaduct Housing Partnership, a development partnership between Stockport Homes and Stockport Metropolitan Borough Council, focusing on building more affordable homes in Stockport.  
 
We formed in 2016, and since then have built over 1,000 homes in the borough and anticipate completion of 450 more in the next 2 years. Step by step, our goal is to help more people get onto the property ladder and see Stockport as one of the most exciting places to live in Greater Manchester. 

Our developments offer a mix of tenures from shared ownership to affordable rent and market sale, supporting first time buyers, growing families and those looking to downsize to find their perfect home.

Name: ACHIA NSW
Description:
The Aboriginal Community Housing Industry
Association (ACHIA) NSW is the peak
body for Aboriginal Community Housing
Providers (ACHPs) in NSW. We advocate for
and represent all not-for-profit, community
controlled, Aboriginal Community Housing
Providers, including Local Aboriginal Land
Councils and other organisations constituted
under law. ACHIA NSW fosters joint work
between ACHPs, government, Aboriginal
communities, and other stakeholders. ACHIA
NSW seeks to grow genuinely co-designed,
culturally-informed responses to housing
issues that affect Aboriginal people, their
families, and communities.

ACHIA NSW is a member-based organisation.
We encourage every ACHP in NSW to join.

Name: KSW - Kärntner Siedlungswerk Gemeinnützige Gesellschaft mbH
Description: Das Kärntner Siedlungswerk Gemeinnützige Gesellschaft mbH (KSW) ist Teil der ÖSW Gruppe die aktuell knapp 60.000 Wohneinheiten verwaltet und konstant neuen hochwertigen und leistbaren Wohnraum von bleibenden Wert schafft. Das Österreichische Siedlungswerk (ÖSW) ist die größte gemeinnützige Wohnbaugruppe Österreichs.

Name: Institute Community Development Initiative
Description: Institute Community Development Initiative (ICDI) provides capacity-building and financial resources to community development corporations (CDC) across North Carolina.  ICDI serves as an intermediary, pooling investments from private equity, foundations, financial institutions, and federal and state funding, to support smaller CDCs and broader community partnerships.

Name: National Affordable Housing
Description: At National Affordable Housing, our purpose is to supply secure affordable housing so that households have the opportunity to improve their quality of life and establish connections to community.

Name: HouseNow 3D
Description:
At our company, we are dedicated to revolutionizing the way we think about affordable housing. By utilizing cutting-edge 3D concrete printing and modular construction techniques, we are able to offer high-quality, cost-effective housing solutions that can be built in half the time of traditional methods.

Our 3D concrete printing technology allows us to create complex, customizable designs with precise accuracy and minimal waste. This, combined with our modular construction techniques, allows us to drastically reduce construction time and costs.

Not only do our innovative housing solutions save our customers money, but they also have a smaller environmental footprint, as they require fewer materials and generate less waste compared to traditional construction methods.

Our ultimate goal is to make affordable, high-quality housing accessible to everyone, and we believe that our 3D concrete printing and modular construction techniques are the key to achieving this. We are excited to continue pushing the boundaries of what is possible in the world of affordable housing and to make a positive impact on communities around the world.

Name: Ministerie van Maak!
Description:
Missie Ministerie van Maak!
‘De collectieve kennis en verbeeldingskracht inzetten om tot nieuwe ontwerpen en inzichten voor Nederland te komen. Hiermee wil het Ministerie van Maak een bijdrage leveren aan de radicale verbouwing van Nederland en concrete oplossingen bieden voor het woningtekort, de 
energietransitie en de gevolgen van klimaatverandering. Tevens zet het Ministerie van Maak aan tot analyse en faciliteert het debat over hoe we Nederland maken in een samenwerking tussen burgers, de ontwerpwereld, de wetenschap, de overheden en de markt.’
Initiatief van IABR, MANN en ZUS

Name: LandxWise
Description:
LandxWise is a specialised greenfield and sub-division development and project management company.

Our projects span across Melbourne’s growth corridors and cover a wide range in scope, size, and budget. We take pride in bringing the diverse and deep skills of our team to deliver exceptional outcomes for our clients on every project we manage.

We’re passionate about supporting our clients in making prudent acquisition decisions and delivering projects in the growth areas of Melbourne,
underpinned by our research and expert knowledge.

At LandxWise our mission is to help developers and investors make informed decisions about their landholdings in Melbourne’s growth area corridors.

Put simply, we help clients unlock the full potential of their land, wisely.

Name: York and North Yorkshire Housing Partnership
Description: The partnership has been created to support the new devolved structures across the region including the delivery of the housing strategies for both York and North Yorkshire.

Name: Nehemiah Project Community Development Corp
Description: Nehemiah Project Community Development Corporation (NPCDC) was established in 2002 as a community outreach to South Fulton County, Clayton County and the City of Atlanta, Georgia. Our mission is to improve the quality of life through assisting and empowering individuals in the areas of housing, health, economic development and education.

Name: Thrive Youth Center
Description:
Our mission is to provide a safe and supportive center for homeless LGBTQ youth so they can become productive, skilled, educated, and successful adults with the opportunity to achieve their dreams.

At Thrive, we are more than a shelter.  In addition to shelter services for youth coming directly off the streets we provide:
	Case Management
	Benefits Assistance
	Counseling
	Career Coaching and Guidance
	Life Skills Assistance
	Educational Support
	Rapid Re-Housing

Name: VITRUVI
Description: Vitruvi connect real estate experts, which results in qualitative developments at excellent locations, which are functional and well designed, always with respect for the neighborhood and its history.

Name: Elderpark Housing
Description: ELDERPARK HOUSING ASSOCIATION is a Registered Social Landlord based at 65 Golspie Streett, Glasgow, Scotland, United Kingdom.

Name: Nautical Lands Group
Description:
Nautical Lands Group is a Premier Owner, Builder and Operator of Wellings Communities for adults 55 plus, Queensview and Harbour Hill Retirement Communities, and parent company of Wellings Modular Construction and NLGC General Contractor. OPerating primarily in Ontario and Alberta 

We are committed to building quality residences that we would be proud to live in ourselves and provide a luxurious, yet affordable, accommodation and lifestyle for our clients.

Name: Epic Real Estate Solutions Inc.
Description:
At Epic, we’re in the business of building connections – with developers, Realtors and homeowners. The Okanagan Valley has been our home for nearly two decades, giving us a deep understanding of the local market. We’re visionary storytellers informed by our market-leading data — harnessing our 100+ years of industry expertise, drive for excellence, and love of the Okanagan Valley to transform your dream into a successful reality.

You have a dream. Together, we'll make it Epic!

Name: Andrews Charitable Trust
Description: As the owner of Andrews Property Group, Andrews Charitable Trust (ACT) uses the dividends generated by the company to support ventures which offer innovative approaches to tackling housing-related poverty and which support Christian organisations to provide books to community spaces.

Name: Great Lakes Housing Services
Description: Experienced housing professionals dedicated to addressing Michigan’s housing shortage. Great Lakes Housing Services (GLHS) assist communities and nonprofits in overcoming barriers to development, fostering partnerships, and accessing vital resources. We are passionate about creating sustainable, affordable housing solutions statewide.

Name: Over-the-Rhine Community Housing
Description:
Mission:
Over-the-Rhine Community Housing is a non-profit organization that works to build and sustain a diverse neighborhood that values and benefits low-income residents. 

We focus on developing and managing resident-centered, affordable housing in an effort to promote inclusive community.

Over-the-Rhine Community Housing was born out of the merger of ReSTOC and Over-the-Rhine Housing Network - two long standing affordable housing organizations in Over-the-Rhine. ReSTOC was founded in 1978 and Over-the-Rhine Housing Network in 1988. Both organizations were founded out of the same movement now recognized as the Over-the-Rhine People's Movement. In order to secure and sustain affordable housing and promote community based development in Over-the-Rhine the two organizations joined forces in April 2006.

Name: Rent to Live Co.
Description: Founded by Australia's largest owner and operator of rental accommodation, RTLCo.'s vision is to democratise the rental market through creating impactful, mixed use neighbourhoods, our first project announced is the Marrickville Timberyards, opening 2028.

Name: Hilldale Housing Association
Description:
Welcome to Hilldale Housing Assocation 
The sole purpose of our existence is to provide high quality housing to people who need additional support. We only provide homes for people who need help to live more independently, in their own home, in their own community and who would otherwise have difficulty finding a home elsewhere. We offer homes for life, or for as long as tenants need and want our services.

Name: Inmovisión
Description: "Nuestro propósito es contribuir con el bienestar y progreso de las personas diseñando espacios donde el sueño de un hogar cobre vida".

Name: HappyDays UK
Description:
Happy Days UK is a Charity bringing hope to the homeless through community and social enterprise.

Our Vision
To bring an end to homelessness across the UK and empower people to live independent and purposeful lives. 

Our Mission
Providing safe accommodation, routine, and structure volunteering and employability skills in a community setting to bring about sustainable change in people’s lives.

Our Values
01. Commitment
We are committed to developing our people

02. Partnership
We commit to seeking partnerships to support our people to build strong foundation.

03. Respect and Equality
We value everyone as intrinsically worthy of love and respect, regardless of background or belief. 

04. Courage
We endeavour to work in the spirit of forgiveness and acceptance and be brave enough to be honest and act with integrity.

Name: Streamline Development Group
Description:
• Streamline Development Group provides unparalleled expertise in multifamily development
• Over 30 years of collective experience
• Focus on San Diego’s urban core submarkets, targeting prime infill locations with high walkability in transit priority areas
• Results-driven, utilizing an integrative approach focused on continual innovation in delivering transformative living spaces
that activate and inspire the communities in which they are built
• Extensive experience in all aspects of development, from land planning and entitlements to capitalization and asset management, we ensure fluidity, successful execution and generation of accretive risk-adjusted returns for our partners

Name: COMQ - Centro de Oportunidades do MQ
Description:
O Centro de Oportunidades do Mário Quintana (COMQ) é uma organização sem fins lucrativos, dedicada a impulsionar empreendedores(as), jovens talentos e a inovação local do bairro Mário Quintana. Fundado com o propósito de despertar o potencial das pessoas da nossa comunidade e promover o acesso e a criação de oportunidades.

Visão:
Ser referência em promover a comunidade, com excelência nos resultados alcançados pelas nossas ações.

Missão:
Gerar acesso à informação e oportunidades de capacitação e empregabilidade para os públicos da comunidade do Mário Quintana. Fazemos isso por meio da divulgação de oportunidades, capacitação profissional gratuita (próprias e/ou de parcerias), e de eventos que fazem a diferença na vida das pessoas, como talks, workshops e oficinas.

Valores:
Entre nossos valores estão: Ética, Educação, Carinho, Inovação, Inclusão e Acesso à Oportunidades.

Name: Mead Realisations Ltd
Description: Mead Realisations is a privately-owned independent land and development company located in North Somerset. We specialise in land promotion and the development of residential, commercial and agricultural properties.

Name: Worcester Common Ground
Description: Worcester Common Ground is a Community Development Corporation that was founded in 1988 in response to absentee ownership in the city, the high cost of housing, and the widespread displacement of families which led to a housing crisis. Currently, our mission is to promote and develop permanent and sustainable improvement in the neighborhoods of Central Worcester through affordable housing, community activism, economic development, and greenspaces that provide healthy food and educational opportunities.

Name: Sedulous Developments
Description:
Sedulous Developments is committed to revolutionising the land development industry through innovative, sustainable, and high-quality projects. Our mission is to create thriving communities that enhance the quality of life for residents, while preserving the environment for future generations. We leverage our financial strength, entrepreneurial spirit, and strategic expertise to deliver exceptional value and lasting impact.

Driven by our vision of change and collaboration.

Name: Aurelina
Description:
شركة "أورليينا" من الشركات المتميزة في مجال التطوير العقاري بالمملكة العربية السعودية، حيث تتفرد بابتكاراتها ورؤيتها الحديثة والمتطورة، كما تتميز الشركة بتقديم 
 خدمات متنوعة في قطاع العقارات بأنواعها، وتتمتع بخبرة عالية ومتنوع في هذا المجال خصوصًا المجال السكني والتجاري.

Name: Mangrove Housing
Description: Mangrove Housing is a not-for-profit organisation that has been assisting local communities to access affordable housing solutions since 1993.  Mangrove Housing offers tailored services and solutions to a range of people in need. Annually the organisation assists over 2,000 people with their housing needs through the management of over 750 properties across Brisbane and the South East corner of Queensland.

Name: Winmark Affordable Housing Network
Description:
Our network for leadership teams in the Housing sector provides the opportunity for knowledge-sharing and learning within an exclusive community of peers. 

Regular roundtable sessions led by experienced Chairs, advisors and senior directors provide the opportunity to debate and discuss issues relating to housing management and strategic planning.

Membership enables the leadership team to also have access to meetings of the other Executive and Non-Executive networks to acquire new skills and knowledge on wider issues such as business strategy, digital transformation, innovation, people management, marketing, legal and sustainability.

Annual membership is open to housing associations, councils and other organisations which provide affordable and social housing services.

Name: Grounded Community Land Trust Advocacy
Description: Grounded is focused on bringing best practices to the affordable housing market by advocating for the introduction of Community Land Trusts (CLTs), a new ‘for purpose’ housing model for Australia. We are doing this by pushing for legislative reforms, and by developing the tools needed for councils, planners, landowners, and prospective CLT community members to act with knowledge and confidence. Read more about our mission on our website and help us help make affordable housing a reality for all.

Name: Haso - Helsingin Asumisoikeus Oy
Description:
Haso tarjoaa kohtuuhintaisia asumisoikeuskoteja helsinkiläisille. Helsingin kaupungin omistaman yhtiön noin 7 000 asuntoa sijoittuvat eri puolille kaupunkia ja tarjoavat kodin jo noin 12 00 asukkaalle.

Asumisoikeusasuminen on huoleton vuokra-asumisen ja omistusasumisen hyvät puolet yhdistävä asumismuoto. Lue lisää asumisoikeusasunnoistamme ja niiden hakemisesta osoitteesta haso.fi

Name: Arcwell Developments
Description: At Arcwell, we're committed to reshaping community infrastructure, prioritizing innovative and sustainable practices. Utilizing prefabricated construction methods to provide safe, eco-friendly, and cost-effective solutions, we make it our mission to ensure a brighter future for your community.

Name: HappyHomes
Description: Is a property technology company that aims to revolutionize the affordable housing industry in developing countries starting with Indonesia. Based on the population, Indonesia is the world’s 4th largest country that needs more than 12.7 million affordable housing as their property backlog. To achieve this, they have created an online platform where future homeowners can easily choose their desired homes and pay for them later.

Name: Cloch Housing Association Ltd.
Description: With over 50 years in the Inverclyde community, this Greenock-based housing association has been dedicated to providing affordable homes and quality services to local residents.

Name: DESARROLLA PSAT
Description: Un dedicado y cuidadoso trabajo de 15 años nos ha permitido llegar a ser la empresa líder en el mejoramiento de la calidad de vida de familias vulnerables en la Región Metropolitana.

Name: IBEX Gruppe AG
Description:
IBEX Gruppe AG is a real estate development and investment company focussing on the development of student assets in the larger student cities in Switzerland.

IBEX Gruppe AG is looking to develop over the coming 5 years a total of 1.500 - 2.000 students apartments in the below mentioned cities.

We concentrate on the development of plots or the redevelopment of existing commercial buildings in good micro locations (maximum of 10-15 minutes with public transport to the University) in the larger student cities in Zwitserland (Basel, Bern, Zurich, St. Gallen, Winterthur, Fribourg and Lausanne).

Name: COMQ - Centro de Oportunidades do Mário Quintana
Description:
O Centro de Oportunidades do Mário Quintana (COMQ) é uma organização sem fins lucrativos, dedicada a impulsionar empreendedores(as), jovens talentos e a inovação local do bairro Mário Quintana. Fundado com o propósito de despertar o potencial das pessoas da nossa comunidade e promover o acesso e a criação de oportunidades.

Entre nossos valores estão: Ética, Educação, Carinho, Inovação, Inclusão e Acesso à Oportunidades.

Name: Akiba Mashinani Trust
Description:
Akiba Mashinani Trust (AMT) is a Kenyan-based social organization that works directly with marginalized urban and peri-urban communities as well as those most at risk of being locked out of mainstream development programmes.  Established in 2007, we offer technical, financial and organizational support to community initiatives exploring innovative solutions to the challenges they face, while also holding decision makers accountable. 

Contact details: 
Email: info@akibamashinani.org
Tel:+254 20 7840031
X: @AkibaMTrust
Instagram: AkibaMTrust
YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/@akibamashinanitrust

Name: HousingLinks
Description:
We are a fully managed service solution for the Irish Housing and Care sectors.  Delivering multi-disciplinary Asset Management support is our core business and we are passionate about what we do.

Through our existing partnerships, we are supporting on Building Surveying, Responsive Repairs, Planned/Cyclical programmes, Compliance, Damp & Mould, Stock Condition Surveys, “Big 6” management and a wide array of additional Property Service functions.

Name: Hertfordshire Infrastructure & Development Board
Description: The Hertfordshire Infrastructure & Development Board was established to create a meaningful link between the Hertfordshire Growth Board’s constituent local authorities and the development and construction sector, with the primary aim of working in partnership to deliver sustainable economic growth and high quality placemaking. HIDB is a subsidiary of the Growth Board and administered in partnership with Meeting Place.

Name: Parkspring Multifamily
Description: Parkspring is a visionary real estate company committed to preserving its roots while responsibly growing, and shaping vibrant communities that exceed expectations and enhance the lives of residents. With a rich history rooted in the valuable experiences gained at Kaplan Multifamily, our founders have garnered invaluable knowledge and expertise, propelling Parkspring toward a future of success.

Name: UNIQ Communities
Description: UNIQ is breaking away from cookie-cutter homebuilding. With decades of industry experience, we’re reinventing the way smaller and medium-sized communities are built. We strive to be responsive to the needs of each person who entrusts us with building their home.

Name: Brown Capital Group
Description: At BCG, we actively seek out and execute real estate investment opportunities spanning diverse product types and regions throughout the United States. Our investment strategy is meticulously implemented, harnessing the combined institutional and entrepreneurial expertise of our dedicated team.

Name: DW Development Group
Description:
Mission Statement: Our mission is to deliver exceptional affordable housing through tax credit
programs while empowering individuals and families with the opportunity to thrive in safe, vibrant, and
well-designed communities. We are committed to building partnerships & networks that foster positive
change in the communities we serve.
Vision Statement: To transform communities and create a better way to live for all by developing
high-quality, sustainable, and affordable housing solutions that foster inclusivity, opportunity, and long-
term well-being
Core Values:
Integrity:
We operate with the highest ethical standards, ensuring transparency, honesty, and accountability in all
aspects of our work. Our reputation is built on trust, and we are committed to doing what is right for
residents, investors, and communities.
Collaboration:
We foster strong partnerships with local governments, investors, community organizations, and
stakeholders. We believe that the best solutions emerge when we work together with a shared vision to
create lasting, meaningful impact.
Determination:
We are driven by an unwavering determination to overcome challenges and achieve our goals. We
approach each project with resilience, persistence, and a strong work ethic, ensuring that our
commitment to quality, timelines, and service never falters. We embrace the hard work required to
create positive change and are committed to seeing projects through to success.

Name: Centaur Housing Association Ltd
Description:
Centaur Housing Association's experienced Housing Management Team works closely with dedicated Registered Social Landlords, Support Providers, and Investors throughout England to deliver specialist housing management services for tenants with additional needs.

We currently offer these services in Lancashire, Merseyside, Manchester, Yorkshire, Cheshire, the Midlands, Stoke-on-Trent, Gloucester, Cambridgeshire, and Plymouth. If you need support in providing housing services in your area, please reach out to us.

For new business opportunities, feel free to contact our office. Our friendly team is always happy to assist!

Name: WoningHuren.nl
Description: Vind je huis, voel je thuis! Op WoningHuren.nl vind je (sociale) huurwoningen van 13 woningcorporaties.  Zoek eenvoudig een huis en reageer.

Name: EMA SAS
Description:
La Société EMA (Entreprise Menuiseries et Aménagements), installée en Gironde depuis 25 ans, réalise la pose de menuiseries et aménagements intérieurs et extérieurs dans plusieurs types d’habitats tels que l’habitat résidentiel collectif, tertiaire, médical mais aussi les logements étudiants.

Spécialisés dans la réalisation de chantiers techniques de menuiserie intérieures et au service des professionnels, nos équipes assurent pour vous la pose de portes, de placards, de plinthes, d’escaliers, de trappes, de boîtes aux lettres et de mains courantes sur l’ensemble de la Nouvelle Aquitaine.

Avec plus de 3000 logements par an réalisés (soit plus de 100 chantiers à l’année), une organisation renforcée, une démarche qualité de pointe ainsi qu’une démarche environnementale, EMA s’engage à sécuriser vos demandes au travers d’un savoir-faire reconnu.

Name: Neovi
Description: Neovi builds homes for a new way of living – leveraging better materials and advanced construction methods unseen in the industry. The result is a higher quality, custom home built faster and more resiliently.

Name: Statens Bostadsomvandling AB
Description:
Vi omvandlar befintliga fastigheter till attraktiva tillgängliga lägenheter för äldre i kommuner runt om i Sverige. Statens Bostadsomvandling AB är ett statligt bolag med ett särskilt samhällsuppdrag att jobba i nära samarbete med kommuner. Vi bidrar till ökad rörlighet på lokala bostadsmarknader och ett mer effektivt nyttjande av bostadsbeståndet.

Statens bostadsomvandling köper och bygger om befintliga fastigheter för att skapa fler bostäder för äldre på svagare bostadsmarknader. Vi jobbar i nära samverkan med din kommun och stöttar i hela projektet - ekonomiskt och projektmässigt. Vi investerar och bär risken för nedskrivning av fastighetsvärden. Energiförbrukningen halveras i fastigheten. Kommunen gör en lönsam samhällsekonomisk affär på flera områden.

På mindre orter gör 12-24 nya lägenheter skillnad på bostadsmarknaden. Rotation uppstår. Nya boendemiljöer gör det mer attraktivt att bo kvar. Fler seniorer hittar ett anpassat boende att flytta till, äldre personer kan delta i samhällslivet och de tidigare boendena blir tillgängliga för nya familjer. Det är ett betydelsefullt samhällsuppdrag som bidrar till framtidstro i våra samarbetskommuner.

Name: City of Buffalo Urban Renewal Agency (BURA)
Description:
City of Buffalo Urban Renewal Agency
(BURA)

Name: WakahChan - Holistic Living
Description: At WakahChan we are committed to providing our clients with a holistic and sustainable living experience. Our mission is to create a community that fosters wellness, harmony, and balance. We aim to achieve this by offering innovative and eco-friendly living solutions that cater to the unique needs of each individual. Join us in our journey towards a healthier and happier future!

Name: Durham Region Home Builders' Association
Description: The Durham Region Home Builders' Association is the voice of the residential construction industry in Durham Region.  The Association represents builders, developers, renovators, trade contractors, professionals, suppliers and manufacturers that work in the Region of Durham.

Name: GVD Real Estate Development
Description: We are involved from beginning to end as developer, and builder of each project and we are passionate about making sure every project is completed and maintained to the highest quality standards. We believe in providing our team members with every tool to guarantee not only our success, but their success as well.

Name: Boldstone
Description: We are experts in novel land development, specialising in the rededication of one-of-a-kind spaces. Our in-house infrastructure and on-the-ground design teams ensure we preserve the spirit of each location so our builds resonate long after we are gone. Places with soul are the bedrock of community and the hallmark of Boldstone.

Name: Continental Developers
Description: Driven by a passion for creating vibrant communities, Continental Developers specialize in crafting homes that blend modern luxury with timeless elegance. From meticulously planned layouts to sustainable design practices, we prioritize the needs and aspirations of our clientele at every step.

Name: SECO (National Conference of Manufactured Home Community Owners)
Description:
SECO gathers together over 700 manufactured home community organizers & managers in a 3 day blitz of networking and education!  

We curate a lineup of speakers to teach higher level training, insights and inspiration for leveling up our communities! 

We hold our industry to a higher standard of consistently improving the lives of those who live within our communities.  We want our staff, who work diligently and with great passion, to feel confident and empowered to help improve those lives and the lives of their own families.

Name: Hope Rescue Mission of the City of Reading
Description:
Since 1894 Hope Rescue Mission has been a place of refuge for the homeless men of Berks County, PA. We shelter over 1,000 men every year through four residential programs that allow men to work while they transition back into the community as productive and independent individuals.

In 2023, we expanded our mission with The Lighthouse Women and Children's Center, which offers women and children an environment of safety, dignity and compassion while they are getting back on their feet.

Name: Consept
Description: Consept is a social investment think tank and Movement Tech lab developing tools and strategies for community-controlled systems. We design software for decentralized organizing, create frameworks for community-led investment, and prototype infrastructure that helps communities govern their own futures. From grassroots economic protest tools like Boycott Buddy to neighborhood intelligence platforms like NICO, our work equips movements and frontline groups with actionable, scalable systems for self-determination. Consept exists to make equity executable—by turning bold ideas into practical infrastructure for systemic change. At Consept, we don't just think about change...we prototype it

Name: Toronto Alliance to End Homelessness
Description:
The Toronto Alliance to End Homelessness (TAEH) is a community-based collective impact initiative committed to ending homelessness in Toronto.  

We bring together agencies, organizations and individuals representing most of Toronto’s shelters, multi-service organizations, and supportive housing providers. Our Community Partners and Individual Supporters work with people who are marginalized by poverty; many of whom are currently homeless.

We are driven by a collective mission to end chronic homelessness.  Or, to put it another way, to make homelessness in our city rare, brief, and non-recurring.

We are community based, focused on what we can achieve through our collective impact.  We recognize the critical importance of working with all levels of government, particularly the City of Toronto, to achieve the goal of ending homelessness.

We work to engage individuals and organizations that represent a broad segment of society and include people with lived experience of homelessness (PWLE), service delivery agencies, research and policy organizations, consumer driven organizations, businesses, associations and advocacy groups and community organizations.

The TAEH also serves as the non-Indigenous Community Advisory Board on housing and homelessness for the City of Toronto. This means that we convene and coordinate the diverse range of homelessness service and housing providers in order to strategically inform City planning and policy on issues related to homelessness.

Name: Harris County Housing Finance Corp.
Description:
The Harris County Housing Finance Corporation was incorporated on June 30,1980 under the Texas Housing Finance Corporations Act and celebrates its 45th year of operation in 2025. Historically, the HCHFC has acted as a bond issuer and direct lender for single family mortgage bonds, and affordable rental housing private activity bonds, in conjunction with 4% LIHTC investments.

As of 2023, the corporation is now actively involved in the following: direct ownership through General Partnerships, land acquisition and groundleases, including both affordable rental housing and our subsidiary corporation, the Harris County Community Land Trust Management Corporation.

Name: Deutscher Verband "Job & Wohnen" e.V.
Description: Unser gemeinnütziger Verband soll gesellschaftliche und soziale Rahmenbedingungen für eine gemeinwohlorientierte Zukunft schaffen.

Name: Shack Dwellers Federation of Namibia
Description:
The Namibia Housing Action Group aims to support the Shack Dwellers’ Federation of Namibia in achieving its mission. NHAG facilitates and advocates for change in the livelihood of urban and
rural poor by supporting the SDFN actions to secure affordable land and shelter and improving the living conditions of those excluded from commercial housing and financial processes, using a
community-driven approach.

The Shack Dwellers’ Federation of Namibia’s focus is to improve the living conditions of low-income people living in shacks, rented rooms, and those without any accommodation while promoting
women’s participation. The federation facilitates and advocates for change for those excluded from commercial housing and financial processes, using a community-driven approach.

Name: Neoland Group Pty Ltd
Description:
Neoland represents a fresh, innovative approach to land acquisition, residential and community development. As “Neo” means new, every one of their developments is created by engineers and managers with wide-ranging expertise in the total life cycle delivery of projects.

The company aims to create inspiring, sustainable residential neighbourhoods that focus on the wellbeing of the residents whilst ensuring exceptional value to stakeholders, partners, and communities. This is done by following a philosophy that revolves around continuous learning and assessments that create projects with core values for success

Name: Rogaland BOBY
Description:
Rogaland Bolig- og Byplanforening (Rogaland BOBY) er en avdeling i Norsk Bolig- og Byplanforening (Norsk BOBY). Vi arrangerer treff om byutvikling og gode boligområder med fokus på temaer som er aktuelle i Rogaland.

Norsk BOBY er en ideell og partiuavhengig organisasjon for alle som er engasjert og interessert i by- og samfunnsplanlegging. Foreningen er landsdekkende og har rundt 650 medlemmer. Medlemmene er planleggere, politikere, utbyggere, beboere og andre med interesse for samfunnsplanlegging.

Norsk BOBY skal arbeide for en bedre by- og samfunnsplanlegging og øke forståelsen for at planlegging er viktig. Vi tar planleggingens mål, arbeidsmetoder og resultater opp til debatt ved å satse på bredt tverrfaglig arbeid, uavhengig av politiske motsetninger og profesjonsgrenser. Vi skal være et korrektiv og en inspirasjonskilde i norsk planlegging. Foreningens interessefelt skal dekke alle områder og sektorer av samfunnsplanleggingen, fra boligbebyggelse og boligmiljø, via generell by- og tettstedsplanlegging, til utbyggingsmønster, arealdisponering og økonomi i kommuner og fylker

Name: ElectriCITY Innovation
Description:
ElectriCITY Innovation arbetar tillsammans med våra medlemmar och partners för en mer hållbar värld. Vi bedriver ett antal testbäddar inom energi, transport, cirkulär ekonomi och digital stadsutveckling. 
ElectriCITY Innovation är en ekonomisk förening. Vi bevakar aktivt alla utlysningar inom miljö- och hållbarhet och deltar i samverkansprojekt med andra intressenter. Vår styrka är att vi har ledande företag, forskningsinstitutioner och högskolor som medlemmar och partners samt att vi har ett nära samarbete med Sjöstadsföreningens bostadsrättsföreningar och boende i Hammarby Sjöstad.

Name: Chateau Developments
Description:
At Chateau, we’re shaping South East Queensland with high-quality residential, commercial, and mixed-use developments. As a full-service builder-developer, we manage site acquisition, design, and construction- ensuring excellence at every stage of development.

Our directors have delivered over 5 Billion dollars in construction projects and have 50+ years of experience combined. We take pride in our ability to manage projects efficiently and deliver high-quality results.

Name: Apartment Association of Metropolitan Pittsburgh
Description:
The Apartment Association of Metropolitan Pittsburgh, AAMP, is the preeminent voice of the multifamily housing industry in Western Pennsylvania 

AAMP was established in 1974 as a sister organization to the Builders Association of Metropolitan Pittsburgh, BAMP.  Today, AAMP has grown to over 200 companies - apartment builders, developers, owners, managers, investors, financial institutions, suppliers, subcontractors, and utilities - working in the multi-family housing industry.  Collectively, AAMP represents more than 100,000 units in Western Pennsylvania.

Since its inception, AAMP’s mission has been constant.  AAMP's primary purpose is to promote the common interests of its members, to provide information and education, while promoting multi-family living to the public.    AAMP has been a positive influence in advocating pro-housing initiatives while promoting public policy actions that would enhance investment, sustainability and growth of the multi-family housing industry.  AAMP provides targeted advocacy, networking events, educational opportunities, and social outings such as our Golf Outing.  AAMP also holds an annual Trade Show and the Apartment Excellence Awards, which highlight the great work of our membership.

The Apartment Association of Metropolitan Pittsburgh is an equal opportunity trade organization and adheres to all applicable local, state, and federal laws with regard to its membership, employment, and all other activities.

Name: Propolis Cooperative Housing Society
Description: Propolis Cooperative Housing Society is a new non-profit housing cooperative organization with a mandate to develop affordable, sustainable, net-zero housing in Kamloops. The long-term plan of our cooperative is to build a network of affordable net-zero multi-family buildings in Kamloops.

Name: Zero Energy Homes
Description: Founded in 2023 by Caroline Pryor to triple solve for Maine's climate, housing, and rural economic development needs, Zero Energy Homes has broken ground on its first home in Searsport - follow along with us for updates!

Name: Team Cheltenham Properties Ltd
Description: A fresh new style of Property Development that continuously gives back to the community. One that not only creates the most luxurious of homes, using only the hard working professionals from Cheltenham. But most importantly one that donates percentages of profits to local charities, truly helping those that need it most.

Name: Aurora Housing Authority of The City of Aurora, IL
Description: The Aurora Housing Authority (AHA) was founded in the 1940’s and charged with the mission of providing safe, decent and affordable housing for the people of the City of Aurora. With funding from the U.S. Department of Housing and Urban Development the AHA provides housing for over 2,000 households through the Low-Income Public Housing and Housing Voucher Programs. Through partnerships with local and regional non-profits the AHA also promotes educational achievement and self-sufficiency.

Name: Taking Ownership PDX
Description: Welcome to Taking Ownership, a small-but-mighty nonprofit brought together by Portland musician, activist Randal Wyatt. Together we renovate and revive Black-owned homes that have requested our help, with an emphasis on enabling Black homeowners to age in place, generate wealth and simultaneously deter predatory investors and realtors to deflect the gentrification process. While nothing can undo the decades of harm imposed upon Portland's Black community via deliberate historical redlining, gentrification and systemic racism, Taking Ownership is turning the tide with a commitment to impactful grassroots change in support of the Black residents of our city. Taking Ownership is dedicated to raising funds and awareness with a team of passionate activists aided by volunteers hitting the streets and making a significant difference in the lives of our Black neighbors. We are always looking for volunteers, and we will put your skills to work, whether it be by fixing a toilet, fundraising, repairing a roof, or putting out the call for resources - Taking Ownership has a need for your time and talent. Together, we are a strong and powerful presence offering support to the Black community that helped shape Portland, this wonderful city we call home.

Name: Alion Service
Description:
Housekeeping may be defined as ‘provision of a clean, comfortable, safe and aesthetically appealing environment’. By another definition, ‘housekeeping is an operational department in a hotel, which is responsible for cleanliness, maintenance, aesthetic upkeep of rooms, public areas, back areas and the surroundings’.

The term Housekeeping outside the hospitality, hospitals refers to the management of daily duties and chores involved in the running of a household, such as cleaning, cooking, home maintenance, shopping, and bill payment etc. These daily recurring tasks may be performed by any members of the household, or by other persons like butler or maids who are hired for the purpose.

Name: Coeur de Ville de La Possession
Description:
"Coeur de Ville" est un éco-quartier situé à La Possession, Ville de La Réunion. Porte d'entrée vers l'Ouest de l'île, ce grand projet modernise et dynamise un nouveau centre urbain dans une démarche d'exemplarité environnementale et de respect de la biodiversité. 
Depuis plus de 6 ans, les habitants ont été associés par le biais de nombreuses concertations et ateliers afin de co-construire ensemble la ville durable de demain.
Ayant déjà accueilli ses premiers habitants, le nouveau quartier comptera à terme 5 000 habitants en 2025, 1 700 logements, 6 000 m² de commerces, 5 000 m² de bureaux, 10 000 m² d’équipements publics pour un total de 350 millions d’euros d’investissement. 

Découvrez dés maintenant la ville réunionnaise de demain !

La ZAC Coeur de Ville est une concession d'aménagement confiée à la SEMADER par la Ville de La Possession.

Name: Holikiday
Description:
Welkom bij Holikiday!

Bij Holikiday geloven we dat wonen meer is dan een dak boven je hoofd. Ons concept draait om kleinschalige, betaalbare woonoplossingen voor kwetsbare ouderen, waar zorg, zelfstandigheid en gemeenschap hand in hand gaan. Onze woningen zijn ontworpen om mensen met een kleine beurs een veilige en comfortabele omgeving te bieden, met zorg op maat en ruimte om echt te leven.

Door intensief samen te werken met gemeenten, zorgorganisaties en betrokken partners creëren we zorggeschikte woningen waar iedereen welkom is en ouderen de ondersteuning krijgen die ze verdienen, terwijl ze verbonden blijven met hun omgeving.

Samen bouwen we aan een toekomst waarin wonen, zorg en welzijn naadloos samenkomen.

Name: Retirement Housing Group
Description:
The Retirement Housing Group (‘RHG-UK’) is the UK’s leading organisation representing the whole retirement housing sector. Our aim is to increase housing choices for older people by advancing and promoting the case for more and better retirement housing across all types and tenures, and we are the only body of our type in the country. 

We work both nationally and locally to raise the profile of retirement housing and tackle barriers that exist in order to increase its supply, range and quality. Our key activities include improving planning, housing, legal and housing management policy by bringing issues and solutions to opinion-formers.

We have been operating since 1995 and our members include the largest providers of existing and new retirement housing – including retirement housing with care and retirement housing with support. Our members are responsible for the delivery of more than 70% of all the types of retirement housing across all tenures in the UK over the last decade.

Name: Aitbaar.Com
Description:
New Lahore City Society & Zaitoon City Society are the Projects of Zaitoon Developers. We Have Residential and Commercial Plots. Zaitoon Developers is Working from 2011 and Alhamdulillah we Delivered to the Client Before Time . Best Opportunity for Investment.
please contact for Further information 
03052299153
03136448810

Name: First Garden Cities Homes
Description:
First Garden Cities Homes is a charitable housing association, providing affordable homes for over 2000 households across Hertfordshire and Bedfordshire.

First Garden Cities Homes Limited was formed on 1st March 2020 following the amalgamation of Howard Cottage Housing Association (HCHA) and Welwyn Garden City Housing Association (WGCHA).

The two legacy organisations share a combined 170-year history of providing homes and services to local people. HCHA was formed in 1911 specifically to provide affordable housing in Letchworth, the world’s first Garden City whilst WGCHA was established for the same purpose in Welwyn Garden City exactly fifty years later.

Today we are a modern and dynamic housing association with an active development programme and strong connections to our historic roots.  This enables us to provide a steady supply of much needed, good quality housing for local people who cannot afford to buy or rent privately.

For any new business, B2B or development related enquiries, please email newhomes@fgch.co.uk.

Name: Philadelphia Accelerator Fund
Description:
Philadelphia Accelerator Fun (PAF) is a nonprofit loan fund created to overcome capital access challenges, provide flexible financing to support Black and Brown developers, and build affordable housing.

The fund designed financial products and lending procedures that overcome traditional barriers to entry for Black and Brown developers and projects in under-served communities. PAF primarily underwrites the project, not just the borrower. PAF offers flexible loan products. There is no minimum loan size. Applications will be evaluated based on an impact score as well as a flexible credit evaluation.

Name: Södra Änggården
Description:
Välkommen till Södra Änggården, Göteborgs mest urbana stadsdel utanför stadskärnan. En plats för dig som vill ha skogen runt knuten och havet inom räckhåll, men hellre vill ha stadsliv än villamattor och förortsstämning.

Vi som utvecklar Södra Änggården är Hökerum Bygg, Bonava, Platzer Fastigheter, Peab Bostad, Månsson Fastigheter och Skanska

Name: Georgia ACT
Description:
Georgia Advancing Communities Together, Inc. (Georgia ACT) is a statewide membership organization of nonprofit housing and community development organizations, professionals, and individuals advancing equitable housing and community development. Specifically, Georgia ACT advocates, represents, provides information to nonprofit organizations, provides networking 
opportunities, communication tools, and seek out resources to support the nonprofit housing and community development sectors across Georgia.

Name: Mallard Homes
Description:
We are a small and growing house building company based in North Yorkshire with a vision of making sustainable living possible for all with beautiful & affordable homes. 

Our team is made up of people with a wealth of experience in planning, place making, and construction management. 
We’re passionate about creating homes that both we and you will be proud of. They are designed and built with the environment in mind. 
Modern methods of construction and sustainable heating and energy systems are at the forefront of what we do to minimise our affect on our precious planet and make the running costs of your new home as low as possible.

We hope that our personal attention to detail and workmanship really shows through on all of our developments.

Name: PDUNM - Projecto de Desenvolvimento Urbano do Norte de Moçambique
Description: Iniciativa que visa melhorar as condições de vida das populações do Norte de Moçambique.

Name: BUILD NOW: Waterloo Region
Description:
BUILD NOW: Waterloo Region is an ambitious housing project that will provide 10,000 units of missing middle housing across the region. With home ownership becoming increasingly out of reach for Canadians, this project will provide an opportunity for middle-income earners to enter the housing market, build equity and enjoy a better quality of life. 

Drawing on a wide continuum of institutional knowledge from trusted stakeholders across the region, BUILD NOW: Waterloo Region is a practical housing solution that will result in significant and lasting change in our communities. Through collaboration and community engagement with the private and public sectors as well as not-for-profit organizations, BUILD NOW: Waterloo Region is a testament to the commitment and tenacity of this community to improve housing conditions for our residents.

Name: Good Good Housing
Description:
We make homes for good. Because housing should be better.

Good Good is a housing organisation that’s reimaging property development, by putting people and planet first, over big profit.

By prioritising true sustainability, people-centric design, social connectivity and well-being over financial gains, we want to positively transform lives, communities, and the world around us.

Name: Yenaier Residences
Description: Yenaier symbolises new beginnings, and is an expression of a unique and luxurious lifestyle — the first of its kind in Oman. It's a new way of living, rooted in sustainability and the future. Inspired from the idea of ‘turning over a new leaf’, Yenaier is a 125,000 square meter project developed by Adrak Developers and is set within the Sultan Haitham City, Oman.

Name: Cunninghame Housing Association Ltd
Description: Cunninghame Housing Association Ltd. was founded in 1984, has over 3600 socially rented properties and 429 Factored properties in management, and growing. With headquarters in the seaside town of Ardrossan, North Ayrshire, CHA operates in the local authority areas of North and East Ayrshire and Dumfries and Galloway.

Name: NORDIC by fäm
Description:
Nordic by fäm is a boutique real estate development brand rooted in Scandinavian design principles — simplicity, functionality, and timeless beauty. Based in Dubai, we develop thoughtfully designed residential and mixed-use projects that bring a sense of calm, quality, and modern living to urban environments.

As part of the fäm Group, our mission is to create spaces that feel as good as they look — homes and communities built around human-centered design, natural materials, and clean architectural lines.

What defines us:

Scandinavian-inspired architecture and interiors

High attention to detail, craftsmanship, and sustainability

Seamless integration of form, function, and lifestyle

From concept to completion, Nordic by fäm delivers distinctive developments that combine Northern European minimalism with Dubai’s bold ambition.

Name: PHNX Development Partners
Description:
PHNX is a mission-driven, full-service affordable housing development firm. We partner with numerous non-profits and government agencies to successfully develop affordable housing throughout New Jersey. 

Visit our website for more information and to view our projects: http://phnxmodular.com.

Name: Inmobiliara Blanco & Punto
Description: Desarrollo Inmobiliario, Bienes Raíces, Diseño integral y Paisajismo

Name: Nowa Bud Poland
Description:
Nowa Bud specializes in the construction and sale of year-round homes using modern frame technology, offering an alternative to city apartments and traditional single-family homes. The high standardization of processes, prefabrication, and innovative materials ensure the durability, safety, and energy efficiency of our homes. 

Since 2015, we have completed over 330 homes in 14 estates around Warsaw. We carefully select locations for our projects, implement modern architectural solutions, and provide a personalized approach to every client. Our priority is to support clients at every stage of the purchase process and maintain a high standard of service

Name: Refugee Talk
Description: Since 2017, Refugee Talk has helped refugees and newcomers in Afghanistan, Turkey, and Canada with settlement, employment, English classes.

Name: Svensk Robotparkering AB
Description: Svensk Robotparkering är en av Sveriges mest erfarna aktör inom lösningar för effektiv parkering av bilar och cyklar. Vi hjälper kunder med kompletta parkeringslösningar med fokus på hela projektets behov. Vi kommer med fördel in tidigt i processen.

Name: Front Step Community Land Trust
Description: Front Step CLT is building community power, thriving neighborhoods and affordable homes in Missoula, Montana. We also lead the ProHousing Missoula coalition in support of zoning reform to encourage long-lasting vibrant community development.

Name: KEY360 MyAfrikA
Description: Creating and Executing a revolutionary, scalable and repeatable blueprint for radically developing and transforming small & informal communities into SMART Settlements by implementing catalyst projects to create sustainable and regenerative economic growth

Name: Störningsjouren i Göteborg AB
Description:
Störningsjouren i Göteborg AB ingår som ett av bolagen i Förvaltnings AB Framtiden, helägt av Göteborgs stad. Vi erbjuder tjänster som skapar trygghet och säkerhet i Göteborgs bostadsmiljöer för hyresvärdar i allmännyttan, privata hyresvärdar och bostadsrättsföreningar om totalt ca 100 000 lägenheter.  

Störningsjouren arbetar med störningshantering och fastighetsjour dygnet runt, vardag som helgdag, året runt. Vårt uppdrag är att i alla delar jobba vräkningsförebyggande. 

Vårt arbete utgår från de mänskliga rättigheterna och principen om alla människors lika värde. Det är en självklarhet för oss att vara korrekta, att följa regelverk samt agera med omtanke och god moral. Det vi gör betyder mycket för många människor. Med stolthet, engagemang och nytänkande gör vi bra insatser tillsammans med dem vi är till för. 

Linkedin-sidan administreras av Störningsjouren i Göteborg AB, ett bolag i Förvaltnings AB Framtiden, helägt av Göteborgs Stad. Tänk på att om du lämnar en kommentar eller gör ett inlägg så blir det en allmän handling som i regel är offentlig. Det du skriver kan komma att lämnas ut om någon frågar efter det. När du använder sociala medier för att komma i kontakt med Störningsjouren, så överförs informationen samt personuppgifter alltid till tredje part (företaget/organisationen som driver det sociala mediet) För din egen skull rekommenderar vi dig att inte skicka känslig information till oss via sociala medier. Vi bemöter inte allmänna klagomål, enskilda frågor i ett specifikt ärende eller politiska frågor. Vi tar bort olämpliga inlägg som reklam, hot, pornografi, kränkande åsikter, personangrepp samt personuppgifter eller annan känslig personlig information.
Har du frågor når du oss på 031-773 83 80 eller info@storningsjouren.goteborg.se, på hemsidan står hur bolaget hanterar personuppgifter: Skydd & behandling av personuppgifter - Störningsjouren (goteborg.se)
Du kan läsa mer om personuppgiftsbehandling och dataskydd på IMY och Göteborgs Stad.

Name: Hessleby Homes
Description: Here at Hessleby Homes, we pride ourselves on developing the highest quality of new build homes.

Name: DEC Housing Ltd
Description:
DEC HOUSING is a flexible and innovative National Community Housing Organisation providing a range of home choices including Ownership, Rent to Own, Shared Ownership, and traditional Rental. 
We are creating quality, affordable, energy-efficient ‘smart’ homes for People With Disabilities, and people on low incomes. We will make sure that everyone in the DECH Community truly feels Safe and Secure in their ‘Own Home’.  
Our Aim is to give:
•	Real CHOICE for your Home – the location; who you share with; what type of housing; and when we help create your own homes the colour, finishes, technology, and anything else possible. 
•	EMPOWERMENT to people by providing different accommodation options to meet your unique circumstances.  People who have felt powerless and undervalued by Government and other housing providers now have options, choices, and opportunities. 
•	Dignity to all the people we are involved with in the way we treat each other, in giving people their own choices and involvement in creating their own homes, and in using our size and assets to create more opportunity to help. 
Our Homes will be:
•	SMART by implementing and creating new responsive Assistive Technologies to enhance living
•	SUSTAINABLE by being Climate Resilient and Energy Efficient  
•	Creating EMPLOYMENT for People With Disabilities
•	Part of a COMMUNITY working together and supporting each other to in work, education, and leisure.

Name: Radharc New Homes
Description: At Radharc New Homes, we build vibrant communities where families and individuals can thrive. We believe in creating homes that provide comfort and security, while enhancing the overall quality of life. Each project is carefully planned and executed to reflect our core values of integrity, innovation, and excellence.

Name: Tesatura Capital
Description: Tesatura Capital LLC (“Tesatura Capital”) is a woman-owned owner/operator of real estate focused on attainable housing and community building

Name: Duurzaamheidspact Eindhoven
Description:
Wij zetten ons in voor groene wijken waar mensen prettig met elkaar wonen. Met energiezuinige en betaalbare woningen waar mensen lang met plezier wonen. Een stad die een positieve voetafdruk heeft doordat we verantwoord omgaan met energie, materialen en afval. Een stad die groeit en bloeit. Met wijken waar de kwaliteit van leven hoog is. Nu en in de toekomst. 

Door kennis te delen, elkaar te inspireren, projecten samen aan te pakken en investeringen samen te dragen, zetten we ons in voor duurzame initiatieven in de stad. Samen staan we in verbinding met alle bewoners van Eindhoven.

Het Duurzaamheidspact Eindhoven is een initiatief van de Gemeente Eindhoven, woningcorporaties ’thuis, Trudo, Wooninc., Woonbedrijf en huurdersvertegenwoordiging PEK (Platform Eindhovense Klantenraden).

Name: Way Forward Housing Coalition
Description: The Way Forward Housing Coalition works to unleash the full potential of the global housing sector to drive economic growth, social equity and environmental sustainability in emerging market and developing countries. To realize this goal, our international coalition harnesses its collective strengths to leverage resources, investments and policies.

Name: Community First Oxfordshire
Description:
Community First Oxfordshire is a community development and placemaking charity. With over 100 years of working with Oxfordshire’s communities, we offer services that support people and places across the county.

Community Development 
We offer support, advice and training to people and groups who:
- Are interested in starting a community action project or want to get their community involved in volunteering.
- Need support with a community asset, like a hall, shop, or transport scheme. Would like to run a community-led plan.
- Are interested in getting involved in community research.

Placemaking 
We offer support and advice to people and groups (including Parish Councils, Town Councils, Local Authorities, and Developers) who:
- Are looking for support with neighbourhood planning, or other planning issues. 
- Want to deliver affordable or community-led housing for their local area. Need advice on stewardship and community management projects.
- Want to get the best from new housing development.

Whether we’re helping a volunteer update their hall’s fire equipment, supporting a community-led plan, or working with the statutory sector on a major placemaking project, we know how to help. Collaborative and integrity-driven, we are passionate about bringing different people together to nurture community-led action and help places and people adapt to change.

Name: Fairview Housing Partners
Description:
Fairview Housing Partners is dedicated to expanding access to quality, affordable homes in communities where they are most needed. Our acquisition and development work includes:
• Owning and developing affordable housing properties through joint ventures with industry partners
• Preserving affordability restrictions on existing apartments, particularly those that are at risk of converting to market-rate
• Expanding affordability restrictions to previously unrestricted conventional “naturally occurring affordable housing”
• Facilitating capital investments that improve the physical condition, sustainability and resiliency of affordable homes.

Name: Ripa Srl
Description:
RIPA è in grado di fornire consulenza e supervisione totale in tutte le fasi di realizzazione dell'immobile a seconda delle diverse esigenze di intervento, dal progetto alla posa in opera.

La volontà di RIPA è tesa a conquistare la fiducia dei
propri clienti tramite la professionalità, la trasparenza e la dinamicità dello staff.

La fiducia è per noi di RIPA il punto di partenza per progettare e realizzare interventi di valore tangibile a basso impatto ambientale, garantendo un approccio competente e pragmatico alla risoluzione dei problemi nel rispetto della qualità. È nostra premura proporre sempre le soluzioni migliori nel rispetto delle esigenze tecniche, stilistiche ed estetiche, ponendo sempre attenzione alle possibilità economicamente più vantaggiose per il committente.

Name: Ministerio de Vivienda y Asentamientos Humanos
Description:
El Ministerio de Vivienda y Asentamientos Humanos, es el órgano técnico Rector del Gobierno de la República en materia de ordenamiento territorial y asentamientos humanos.

Desde este Ministerio, se emiten las políticas y directrices, en función de las necesidades y demandas de los distintos estratos socioeconómicos, con el propósito de facilitar el acceso a viviendas, sujetas a la coordinación de una planificación integral de nuestro país.

Name: Brambleton Community Association
Description:
Vision: A visionary community valuing excellence that offers inclusive and connected lifestyles.

Mission: To engage, support, and serve the Brambleton community through professional stewardship and innovative practices.

Name: Næstved Ejendomsforum
Description:
Næstved Ejendomsforum er en forening af ejendomsinvestorer, rådgivere, udviklere og Næstved Erhverv A/S, der arbejder for at fremme udvikling og samarbejde i, og med, Næstved Kommune. Vores primære mål, og fælles ønske, er at styrke byudviklingen og ejendomssektoren i hele Næstved Kommune – uden individuelle mål for øje.

Vi engagerer os aktivt i at generere ideer og udarbejde oplæg til udviklingen i Næstved kommune, herunder udviklingen af bymidten samt nye udviklingsmuligheder indenfor ejendomssektoren og byggeri i hele Næstved Kommune. 

Næstved Kommune og Næstved Erhverv har givet tilsagn om, at være aktivt deltagende bl.a. i form af deltagelse i generalforsamlinger, bestyrelsesmøder og relevante arrangementer i netværket.

Foreningens mål er, gennem de mange kompetencer medlemmerne besidder, at inspirere med oplæg til udvikling af specifikke områder i kommunen, gerne i samarbejde med Næstved Kommune og byrådet.

Vi afholder arrangementer der samler og inspirerer til fælles forståelse af byudvikling, og er nysgerrige på nye tendenser og muligheder, gerne fra andre danske kommuner eller fra udlandet.

Description:
Tirion Homes was created in 2012 by Welsh Government and Principality Building Society to deliver mixed tenure affordable housing across Wales using an innovative finance model negating the need for Social Housing Grant.  

Tirion Homes is a Community Benefit Society and independent not-for-profit affordable housing developer and estate manager. Tirion Homes is not a commercial developer or Registered Social Landlord.

Tirion Homes has sites in Cardiff (The Mill), Newport (Royal Victoria Court) and Tonyrefail (Parc Eirin). In total, more than 1,500 homes will be delivered comprising; social, intermediate and discounted rent; open market sales; low-cost home ownership; and market rent.
