Name: LISC New Jersey
Description:
LISC New Jersey is a local oﬃce of the nation’s largest community development enterprise, Local Initiatives Support Corporation (LISC). Together with residents and partners, LISC forges resilient and inclusive communities – great places to live, work, visit, do business and raise families. Since 1986, LISC New Jersey has worked to create communities of opportunity in the greater region.

***

In 1979, when the Ford Foundation first conceived of LISC, it envisioned an “intermediary”—a nimble non-profit with strong community partnerships that would connect hard-to-tap public and private resources with under-resourced communities working to access opportunities everyone deserves.

The premise is still as it was then: government, foundations and for-profit companies have the capital; residents and local institutions understand the need; and LISC helps bridge the gap by offering the relationships and expertise to assist community organizations in attracting the kinds of resources that allow them do their best work.

The components of our programming and our role continue to evolve and expand. But for 40 years, our mission has remained the same.

Name: Pivot Projects Ltd
Description:
We're all about making property development simple and accessible for investors. We're focused on driving 20%-25% annualised returns on equity for our clients.

There's a lot of risk in property development, you can make a small fortune or lose your shirt. It's complex, takes lots of experience to navigate and it's hugely time consuming. Getting it wrong can really hurt.

We simplify the process by taking on all the planning, product development, cost and management risk as our part of our structured development partnership system. Our projects are repeatable and scalable.

Most of our partners want the high returns from development but don't have the time, capability or experience to develop property. Especially the time.

Our Development Partnerships provide for 20% - 25% annualised returns on equity, with projects that are repeatable and scalable.

You provide the capital, own all the assets. We do all the work with our end-to-end service and we deliver everything at a fixed cost. Then we repeat.

We have put together this really cool six-stage system for delivering residential developments on a total fixed cost basis.

We do all the complex stuff and give our clients a simple fixed fee for each stage, with one fixed payment for each month of the life of the development. 

Everyone knows exactly where they stand at any time. 

This makes property development easy and assessable and only requires a client to put in about 1-2 hrs a month. 

We then deliver an end-to-end service from finding a suitable site, design and consents, turnkey construction and total sales and finalisation of the project.

We're also committed to building faster and better using innovation, pre-fabrication methodology and practical building applications.

If you like the sound of this, get in touch.

Name: Homfix Brookside Valley
Description:
A bold new life awaits you at Brookside Valley, a brand-new community of villas situated at the cutting edge of modern design. Residents of Brookside Valley enjoy luxury living with a sparkling street charging point, fitness center and games area, car parking etc.

Surround yourself with fresh energy, high-tech amenities, and elevated style. Indulge in extraordinary amenities, relax in appealing social spaces, and cultivate your ideal life. We're the fresh look in this historic district - a vibrant new community for your family.

Nothing quite complements a comfortable, stylish home like an array of luxury amenities. Discover a Brookside Valley from our convenient location.

Name: Whai Kainga
Description: At Whai Kāinga we support the physical and emotional journey toward securing housing, while honoring the cultural significance of kāinga as more than just shelter it’s about whakapapa and whānau.

Name: OpenOasis
Description:
OpenOasis is a revolutionary hosting platform for refugees in time of crisis. We improve upon current providers of free-hosting by being entirely scalable, greatly improving the ease of access as well as being extremely flexible (the power is in your hand). By creating a completely automated platform, we will be able to immensely reduce the length of the current hosting application process. By providing refugees with safe and supportive accommodations, we enable them to focus on rebuilding their lives and pursuing their dreams.


The App.

Our user-friendly interface allows hosts to create personalized listings, showcasing the unique aspects of their spaces. Hosts can specify their preferences and availability, ensuring a seamless matching process that meets both the needs of the guests and hosts. Our platform enables Refugees to search for available hosts, filtering results based on location, amenities, and host profiles. Safety and trust are paramount at OpenOasis. We are implementing fast and secure verification process for users, combined with user reviews and ratings.


The Community.

At OpenOasis, we understand that the true magic lies in the connections forged between hosts and guests. We are building a vibrant and supportive community where individuals from all backgrounds can come together to share stories, experiences, and knowledge. Our community forum will enable users to engage in meaningful discussions, seek advice, and find resources to navigate their journeys effectively.


The Founders.

Led by a team from the University of Geneva, OpenOasis is a humanitarian project designed to give a quick and efficient response to world crisis like the Ukrainian War or the latest Turkish earthquake. The project emanates from a multicultural team of Human and Sustainable development experts composed of Tobias Colin (France), Parna Bhattacharya (India), and Wesna Aziz (Afghanistan).

Name: GVR Gemeentelijke VerduurzamingsRegeling
Description:
De Gemeentelijke VerduurzamingsRegeling is de slimme oplossing voor het terugdringen van warmtevraag door woningen. Een wijkgerichte oplossing voor het voorbereiden op alternatieve warmtevoorzieningen.

Dit doen we door het verduurzamen van woningen bereikbaar maken voor iedereen. Volledig ontzorgd, zonder gedoe en zonder eigen investering.
Zo verduurzamen we samen met gemeenten op een schaalbare wijze woningen en helpen we woningeigenaren direct met energie besparen.
Doe met ons en meld je aan via gvr.nl

Name: Grovewood Community Development
Description:
Founded in 1995, Grovewood Community Development is a mission-driven affordable housing partner in South Metro Denver creating infrastructure for people of modest means and challenging circumstances to thrive.

At Grovewood, we believe that everyone deserves access to a safe and stable place to call home because housing is foundational to human health and wellbeing.

Quality affordable housing provides tangible social and economic benefits not only for residents, but for entire communities. We take pride in the quality of our properties–from design and construction through management, maintenance, services, and programming. As proven community builders with decades of experience successfully navigating the complexities of affordable housing, Grovewood develops and operates affordable housing through strong public and private partnerships.

Today, we operate nine affordable housing communities that serve hundreds of residents in South Metro Denver–from working families and seniors to individuals with devel

Name: FUTUR
Description: FUTUR offers regenerative, affordable starter-homes as a real solution to the housing and climate crises. Non-toxic, highly energy efficient, and intelligently designed for ideal function and flow, FUTUR’s dwellings make a life in harmony with Earth possible. Crafted from sustainable materials such as hemp lime, reclaimed lumber, and recycled metal, a FUTUR home does not fight with Nature but collaborates with her. FUTUR is a holistic vision for a new way of living. Join us in the regenerative revolution. www.futur.earth

Description:
ACU Desarrollos nace de la experiencia de 20 años de trabajos en el sector inmobiliario por parte del socio principal. Al ser una marca de nueva creación, tienen una personalidad basada en el ímpetu, el sentido de necesidad del mercado que adquiere bienes muebles con diseños innovadores y procesos constructivos confiables en lugares de rentabilidad probada.
El toque social que distingue a la marca es la empatía hacia nuestro público con el grado de compromiso y lealtad para brindar espacios ideales, atractivos financieramente y con un sentido existencial cubierto por las diversas áreas del modelo de negocio, que son integrales y que van desde: 

Innovación y Gestión de Negocios de los proyectos a desarrollar.
Dirección Estratégica y de Operaciones.
Planeación de proyectos Integrales. 
Administración óptima de recursos.

Creatividad e innovación de marcas.
Cuidado y de construcción integral del medio ambiente.

Name: Hobro Byforum
Description:
Hobro Byforums formål er: Foreningen vil arbejde for at skabe en levende, attraktiv, sammenhængende bymidte i Hobro med et højt aktivitetsniveau og stort økonomisk flow, der kan fastholde og tiltrække forretninger, gøre gågadens lejemål eftertragtede, skabe økonomisk vækst og øge forretningernes omsætning.


Foreningen vil med sin indsats medvirke til at øge bosætningen ved at gøre byen attraktiv for nuværende og kommende borgere – herunder ikke mindst de unge – samt medvirket til at øge turismen, styrke kulturlivet og byens/ kommunens vækst.


Foreningen vil arbejde på at skabe udvikling gennem sammenhængskraft, koordinering og meningsfyldte fællesskaber på tværs af midtbyens aktører, og Hobro Byforum vil altid have fokus på kvalitet og på at fortælle positive historier om Hobro. Foreningen vil i sit arbejde rumme plads til drøftelse og igangsættelse af nye og bæredygtige ideer og visioner for Hobro.


Foreningen vil samarbejde med Mariagerfjord Kommune og bakke positivt op om kommende planer for byen såsom Midtby Campus, Fyrkat på Unesco verdensarvlisten, udvikling af kulturlivet m.v. Ift. ovenstående vil Hobro.


Byforum fortrinsvis arbejde med aktiviteter og indsatser, der skaber udvikling m.v. i gågadestrækningen fra Kirketorvet til Posttorvet samt forbindelsen fra Store Torv til Kulturkajen. I forbindelse hermed også skabe flow til midtbyen fra Panoramaruten, Fyrkat m.v.
Foreningen er partipolitisk uafhængig og baseret på frivillighedsprincippet.

Name: Housing Action Council
Description:
Housing Action Council (HAC) is a regional not-for-profit organization dedicated to expanding housing opportunities for low- and moderate-income households throughout the Lower Hudson Valley region. For nearly 50 years, we’ve helped bring thousands of affordable homes to life—partnering with local governments, developers, and communities to support inclusive growth and equitable development.

Our work spans housing policy, planning, and direct services—from helping residents access rental and homeownership opportunities to advising municipalities on zoning, development, and fair housing strategies. Team members engage in a wide range of hands-on projects and collaborate closely with leaders across sectors.

We believe that housing sits at the center of nearly every issue that shapes our communities – it’s not just about where we live; it’s about how we live. At Housing Action Council, we work each day to make sure more people can live with dignity, stability, and a real chance to thrive.

Name: Paraiso International
Description: In response to the evolving demands of modern living, Paraiso International is thrilled to unveil the groundbreaking advancement in prefabricated housing design. Merging cutting-edge technology, sustainability, and ergonomic elegance redefines the concept of comfortable, efficient, and eco-friendly living spaces.

We want this to be a place where they can always feel connected, no matter where they are in the world. Our goal is to offer a space that feels like a cozy spot they can always come back to, even after they move on from Tokyo.

Name: Silverwoods Resort Yarrawonga
Description:
The Sebel Yarrawonga – A Premium Regional Retreat Destination

Nestled on the picturesque banks of Lake Mulwala, The Sebel Yarrawonga is a premium boutique resort offering a seamless blend of luxury, relaxation, and nature. Located just three hours from Melbourne, this sophisticated retreat is an ideal destination for corporate getaways, leadership retreats, and wellness experiences.

Accommodation & Facilities
The resort features stylish, contemporary accommodation, ranging from well-appointed studios to spacious apartments, all designed to maximize comfort while showcasing stunning waterfront views.

Guests can enjoy:

Black Bull Golf Course – An award-winning 18-hole championship course offering a premium golfing experience.
Sunset Bar & Stock & Barrel – Exceptional dining experiences featuring fresh, local produce with a focus on regional flavors.
SOL Wellness Centre – A state-of-the-art wellness facility offering treatments, yoga, meditation, and holistic health experiences.
Infinity pool & fitness centre – Designed for relaxation and rejuvenation.
Versatile event spaces – Conference and meeting rooms tailored for corporate retreats, strategic planning days, and stakeholder events.
A Unique Regional Conference & Retreat Venue
With a focus on building connections and fostering community engagement, The Sebel Yarrawonga offers a distinctive retreat setting for corporate groups, combining premium hospitality with unique team-building experiences. These include:

Clay shooting with an Olympic champion
Private Cumberoona River cruises
Exclusive regional wine-tasting experiences with Fowles Wine as a strategic stopover option
Tailored leadership and team development workshops
The Sebel Yarrawonga is more than just a resort—it is a destination that enhances business, leadership, and wellness retreats while directly supporting the local community. Whether arriving by car, private plane via Yarrawonga or Albury Airport, or even helicopter (landing across from the resort

Name: Arkos Properties Group
Description:
Arkos's name is derived from the name of a stone which is born out of Japanese Art of stone formation or arrangement called “ishigumi”. Ishigumi is part of the foundation of Zen Living: the very energy of life, the spark of creation, the lifecycle, impermanence, infirmity while the stone embodies solidity and strength.

Arkos's vision is to bring "Dreams to Reality" which revolves around Ishigumi and Greenery which is depicted in our logo too.

Look out for our projects coming soon in Pahang and Perak.

Name: Spire View Housing Association
Description:
Spire View Housing Association is a Registered Social Landlord based in the North East area of Glasgow, Royston. We strive to provide affordable, good quality homes and improve the lives of our tenants and local residents. 
We believe in partnership working and are an active member of the Royston Strategy Group, and believe working with others can only lead to the best possible outcomes. 
Spire View Housing Association was founded in 2002 after a merger between James Nisbet Housing Co-operative and Garngad Housing Association.
In 2022 Spire View proposed a Transfer of Engagement of Copperworks to Spire View and in May of 2023 Copperworks tenants voted 93.1% in favour of Copperworks transferring to Spire View, with a whopping 87.3% of Tenants turning out to vote.

Name: HomeShare for Her
Description:
Home Share for Her is a not-for-profit organisation that aims to connect women with homes, to women who are looking for housing and to support them to establish an affordable, safe, secure, medium to long-term tenancy on the best possible foundation. 

Women living alone often experience loneliness, financial insecurity, and struggle with the practicalities of managing a large property.

Many women like the idea of sharing their house with another compatible woman, but find the process of advertising and interviewing for potential housemates daunting.

Home Share for Her is a safe and secure website for women to connect with each other.  We also provide useful advice, resources, and templates you can use to help with reference checking, interviews, and setting up your home sharing agreement.

Name: The Listening Group, LLC
Description: Ed Boyte is the founder of The Listening Group, LLC., which consults, coaches, and trains communities in conflict resolution and housing problem solving.

Name: Family Promise of Sussex County
Description:
Family Promise of Sussex County has been serving the community for 25 years.  At its inception, our agency was a grassroots effort to address homelessness in our county and has blossomed into a full spectrum of services to aid those experiencing a housing crisis.

The mission of Family Promise of Sussex County is to secure housing stability and sustainability for those in crisis… because everyone deserves a home. 
Ourapproach involves prevention services before familiesbecome homeless, shelter to help families experiencing homelessness, and housing stabilization programs oncefamilieshave secured housing. 

Our services include Emergency Shelter, Opening Doors: Men’s Day Program, Intensive Case Management Services, Utility Assistance Programs, Employment and Careering Counseling, Homelessness Prevention, Rapid Rehousing, Shelter Diversion, and Permanent Supportive Housing Programs.

Yolo County Housing Authority
Description: Yolo County Housing (YCH) is a public housing authority dedicated to providing safe, decent, and affordable housing opportunities for low-income individuals, families, seniors, farmworkers, and people with disabilities throughout Yolo County. YCH administers Housing Choice Vouchers and public housing, manages migrant centers, and partners with local jurisdictions and community organizations to support housing stability and economic mobility. Through strategic planning, resident services, and collaborative development efforts, YCH works to preserve and expand affordable housing while fostering healthy, inclusive communities in Davis, Woodland, West Sacramento, Winters, and unincorporated areas of the county.

Name: Milenio Communities

Name: Beverly-Vermont Community Land Trust
Description:
Beverly-Vermont Community Land Trust [BVCLT]’s mission is to build community power to keep working class communities of color in their homes and neighborhoods through permanent affordability and democratic community ownership in Koreatown and the surrounding transit-oriented neighborhoods in Los Angeles by:
- Advocating for the decommodification of land and removing land permanently from the speculative housing market. 
- Creating just, equitable and ecological housing developments and alternative community ownership models.
- Serving as an incubator for member-led programs and campaigns through centering the leadership of those most impacted by gentrification, displacement, and racist, extractive housing policies.

Name: Alliance for Community Impact
Description: Formerly known as Community Impact Partners, we are a 501c3 nonprofit that advances people-centered community economic development through education, technical assistance, and cross-sector collaborative partnerships. We work alongside our North Texas neighbors to catalyze action plans for thriving communities, to develop and preserve attainable housing, attract capital investments, build wealth, encourage entrepreneurship, sustain nonprofits, and create jobs.

Name: Develop CHI
Description: Energy companies extract millions of dollars from cities every month. Now imagine that money flowing back in... Develop CHI partners with cities, communities, and their stakeholders to help meet energy needs with industry leading, American made solar panels with 43% efficiency, paired with the latest battery tech. We reinvest the profits back into the community by building housing, holistic wellness centers, sustainable food systems, and subsidizing their access. Our Community Health Infrastructure model for regenerative economic development turns an extractive economy into a regenerative one, creating jobs, increasing health and education, and future-proofing cities for generations to come.

Name: Sunshine Life Centre
Description: The multifaceted development obstacles encountered by marginalized communities residing in South Africa's townships, small towns, and rural areas stem from a complex interplay of various factors. Effectively tackling these challenges demands a comprehensive and interconnected approach that embraces the diverse dimensions of these issues. Establishing a collaborative platform involving all stakeholders is paramount to fostering viable solutions. At the forefront of this endeavour is Shine, operating within The Sunshine Life Centre based in Port Alfred, South Africa. Collaborating closely with individuals navigating these developmental hurdles, alongside the Sunshine NGO Forum, and in partnership with both commercial entities and governmental bodies, Shine has spearheaded the conception and ongoing implementation of integrated, sustainable solutions within the Ndlambe Municipal area.

Name: Montana Housing Coalition
Description: The Montana Housing Coalition (MHC) advocates for a coherent state housing policy that creates homes that working families, seniors, and Montanans with disabilities can afford to rent or buy. The coalition envisions playing a central role in creating housing and community development that produces desirable, healthy, thriving, and affordable communities. We must work together to use our collective knowledge and experience to not only raise awareness of the housing challenges across the state, but also to be part of crafting the solutions.

Name: Urbanus Partners
Description: An affordable housing development consulting firm dedicated to providing expert services to public housing agencies and community development organizations.

Name: Centric Development

Its Brickmont & Amplify brands will continue their growth by expanding into the Colorado, and Virginia markets over the next 12 months. Centric Development’s long-range plan is to use its President, Mr. Vickers’, extensive national development and construction experience to roll out its Senior Living communities as he has successfully done with other similar products

Our Mission:
We strive to provide our community members with the fundamental tools to create a meaningful life filled with purpose and usefulness.
We believe that can be accomplished by developing integrity, learning accountability, building trust, lasting friendships and interacting with other people while having fun along the way.
Our Vision:
Create an environment that provides tools, opportunities and support for those on their journey to a lasting recovery from addictions

Name: Punjab Housing and Town Planning Agency | PHATA
DCC Senior Housing
Description:
DCC Senior Housing  is a nonprofit owner of two senior living communities in the Atlanta Metro.  The journey to walk alongside aging and permanently disabled adults continues to enrich all who are close to this organization.  Established in 1968 by the Decatur Church of Christ, the board continues to carry out the mission to serve the ever growing need of truly affordable housing as a Fair Housing provider.

The organization continues to build lasting partnerships that carry forward this basic necessity for aging adults.  The residents are the inspiration and give guidance to the communities that enrich OUR tomorrow.

Name: ECAHLI Self-sustainable Community Initiative
Description: ECAHLI provides individuals and families with a fresh beginning, presenting opportunities, a sense of purpose, a healthier way of living, and a significant return on investment. What sets this exclusive gated community apart from others is straightforward. We provide our residential investors with job opportunities, a focus on sustainability, and avenues for growth. By granting our residents an equal stake in ECAHLI, we collaborate on the development, management, and future planning of our self-sustaining community framework and operations. Through our collective efforts and engagement, we enhance and expand our community’s infrastructure and operations, making them more efficient. This allows us to dedicate more time to our families, hobbies, and personal interests.

Name: Permira Property Management
Description: Property Management

Name: ALKEIS
Description:
Build your living space for life with Alkeis modular components. Buy or rent design-furniture with minimal design, maximal longevity and full circularity. 

We had to start somewhere, now. New ways and forms of building and living. The actual change- making is what counts: Alkeis researches, builds and provides best-sustainable human living.

Best-sustainable means re-thinking all aspects of our living space in design, materials, and usability. Our products come with a full life-long take back service. The decidedly light and compact form language and flat-pack delivery and storage of our series all combine for an all-round optimized sustainability, carbon and physical footprint. But furniture is just the start for our sustainable wood technology.

Name: Orange Splot
Description:
We believe that one of the most important things we can do to minimize our ecological footprint is to live in less space with a community of neighbors, making it easy (and fun) to share resources.

Orange Splot LLC, creates small, functional and beautiful homes with interior and exterior common spaces. These communities are designed to foster interaction among residents and make it easy for neighbors to share resources and thereby live happier, simpler, less resource-intensive lives.

Name: CareVillas Australia
Description:
Housing solutions comprise fit-for-purpose equitable affordable accommodation to facilitate independence, quality of life, and ability to age in place and remain in the community.

- Award-winning design and innovation in 2024 for the Insiders Ageing Award. 
- Global Award winner for The Most Outstanding Creator of Fit-for-Purpose Affordable Dementia Housing in the World in 2024
-  Finalists SilverEco Solution - Ageing Well Award 2024

Name: Simaruba Ecoaldea El Salvador
Description:
Simaruba Ecoaldea en El Salvador.

¿Buscas un estilo de vida diferente, rodeado de naturaleza y con propósito?
En Simaruba Ecoaldea tienes la oportunidad de ser parte de una comunidad sostenible, innovadora y conectada con el entorno.

Ubicada en Zaragoza, La Libertad en El Salvador, Simaruba ofrece 9 viviendas exclusivas en arrendamiento o alquiler, diseñadas para solteros, parejas jóvenes y nómadas digitales que desean vivir en equilibrio entre la comodidad moderna y la vida ecológica.

Reconocida con el Premio Nacional a la Sostenibilidad 2024 por la Cámara Salvadoreña de la Construcción (CASALCO), Simaruba es un modelo pionero de desarrollo regenerativo, demostrando que el progreso puede ir de la mano con la preservación del medio ambiente.

Su ubicación privilegiada la convierte en un lugar único: a solo 20 minutos de Surf City, el corazón del turismo surfista salvadoreño; 15 minutos de San Salvador y 45 minutos del Aeropuerto Internacional. Perfecta para quienes valoran la conexión, la tranquilidad y la cercanía a los principales centros urbanos.

Cada vivienda ha sido diseñada bajo principios de arquitectura sostenible, integrando materiales responsables, eficiencia energética y un entorno que fomenta la convivencia, el bienestar y la creatividad.

Nuestra misión es inspirar una forma de vida consciente, donde la comunidad, la innovación y el respeto por la naturaleza sean la base del crecimiento.

Nuestra visión: ser la primera de una red de ecoaldeas a lo largo y ancho de El Salvador, impulsando un modelo de desarrollo sostenible, humano y colaborativo.

Vivir en Simaruba Ecoaldea es mucho más que habitar un espacio: es unirte a una comunidad que cree en un futuro más verde, conectado y auténtico.

Simaruba Ecoaldea — Donde la vida florece en armonía.

Te invitamos a descubrir más sobre este proyecto y ser parte de la transformación hacia un El Salvador más sostenible.

Name: Raise Desarrollos Inmobiliarios
Description:
Desarrollamos ideas, construimos oportunidades.

Nos distinguimos por nuestra visión vanguardista e innovadora en el desarrollo y la construcción, buscando constantemente nuevas oportunidades de negocios.

Nuestro compromiso se refleja en la creación de espacios distintivos, definiendo así un estándar excepcional en el sector.

Name: CONTINENTAL CONSTRUCTION COMPANY
Description:
We are a group of companies that work in synergy with the purpose of engaging in community revitalization initiatives by building sustainable high quality work-force housing.
We are committed to provide housing facilities throughout South Florida through programs from the US Department of Housing and Urban Development.

Name: Inspiring Community Homes
Description:
Inspiring Community Homes was formed in 2023 on the back of long-standing work with the founder Adam Tyas and his collaboration with Inspired Structured Solutions (ISSL) and a Tier 1 bank.

The UK’s social housing market is in crisis with record waiting lists for new homes, families living in emergency accommodation and homelessness on the rise. Inspiring Community Homes can provide a cost-effective solution to this crisis with the delivery of high quality, much needed properties in the Supported Living, Assisted Living and Social Housing sectors.

We are focused upon delivering housing solutions to the very highest standards. Our homes are designed to not only meet today’s building standards, but also to meet future standards. Our homes are energy efficient, incorporate technologies that positively impact the fuel poverty crisis, and help families feel safe and secure. All at no cost to the local authority.

Name: ISG Bahnhofsviertel Münster e. V.
Description:
Die Immobilien- und Standortgemeinschaft Bahnhofsviertel Münster e.V. macht sich für die Aufwertung des Standortes stark. Hier arbeiten Eigentümer und Geschäftsleute Hand in Hand an den Herausforderungen der Zukunft.

Wir wollen ein attraktives und starkes Bahnhofsviertel und optimieren den Einzelhandels-, Dienstleistungs- und Wohnstandort mit innovativen Ideen.

Wir entwickeln Konzepte für einen nachhaltigen Branchenmix für das gesamte Bahnhofsviertel.

Wir beraten Eigentümer, die Ihr Objekt umbauen bzw. gestalterisch aufwerten wollen.

Wir unterstützen Einzelhändler, die ein geeignetes Ladenlokal suchen und beraten Eigentümer bei der Suche nach geeigneten Mietern.

Wir initiieren und organisieren kulturelle Events und planen „echte“ Gemeinschaftsaktionen.

Wir setzen mit wirksamen Quartiersmarketing Zeichen und formen den Wirtschaftsstandort nach unseren Visionen.

Wir schaffen für unsere Mitglieder direkte und mittelbare Mehrwerte und Synergien. Gemeinsam mit unseren starken kommunalen Partnern und den Wirtschaftsverbänden fördern wir gezielte Stadtentwicklung für das Bahnhofsviertel.

Unser Quartiersdienst sorgt für Ordnung im Bahnhofsviertel. Wir unterstützen auch Sie und Ihre Immobilie im Bahnhofsumfeld mit unseren Dienstleistungen. Damit tragen Sie zur Aufenthaltsqualiät bei und zeigen soziales Engagement, weil wir Menschen mit Behinderungen einen sozialversicherungspflichtigen Arbeitsplatz ermöglichen.

Name: 85 Community Development Corporation
Description: We are a place-based organization serving diverse communities residing along Interstate 85 in northeast Metro Atlanta through culturally specific services and community-based development to advance community self-determination.

Name: Westminster Towers
Description:
Our mission is to provide services that inspire, encourage, and empower seniors while demonstrating the love of Christ to support individual well-being.
Today, our community offers 130 Independent Living apartment homes, 45 Assisted Living studios and suites, 11 Medicare-Certified, Short-Term Rehabilitation beds, and 33 Long-Term Care beds. Our Campus Home Care Program was implemented to assist residents with the support they need while remaining in independent apartments at the Towers.

Name: Veterans Off-Grid
Description: Veterans Offgrid is a non-profit organization that aims to support veterans and their families by providing sustainable housing solutions. The organization believes that veterans have a unique skill set and work ethic that can be leveraged to build sustainable off-grid communities. Veterans Offgrid provides training and education programs to help veterans learn how to develop and maintain off-grid homes and communities. The organization also offers support services to help veterans overcome the challenges of transitioning from military to civilian life. By empowering veterans to build sustainable off-grid communities, Veterans Offgrid hopes to create a sense of purpose and belonging for veterans and their families while promoting environmental sustainability.

Name: ATOM Building Technologies
Description: ATOM builds residential home developments that embrace the power of technology and eco-consciousness. Our mission is to revolutionize the way we live by offering customizable, sustainable, and technologically advanced homes that are tailored to the needs of growing families.

Name: Michael Howard Homes
Description:
For more than 30 years Michael Howard Homes have been specialising in the strategic planning, property development and construction of individual properties of style and distinction. Being based in the picturesque county of Suffolk has been a great inspiration to our company. We believe providing our clients with exceptionally high standards of construction, design, craftsmanship and environmental care, creating period homes of the future that are a pleasure to live in and a delight to the eye.
We are dedicated to excellence in all aspects of our business from planning, through construction to customer care and our acknowledged success is due to this commitment to our home buyers.

Name: Hunter Homes and Shelters Inc.
Description:
Hunter Homes and Shelters manufactures affordable, easy to build transportable, reusable, durable and energy efficient buildings. Buildings can be used for emergency or long-term housing, military field installations, schoolhouses and medical facilities. All Hunter structures are energy efficient and ideal for off-grid locations. 

The global housing crisis is severe. It is estimated that over the next 80 years, more than two billion homes will be needed. Hunter’s solutions are the most cost effective options available on the market today. 

The company was founded in 2010 by Jack Hunter. Originally deployed in Haiti for post-earthquake relief, buildings have since been used for temporary housing after Superstorm Sandy, to solve the housing challenges of the Shinnecock Nation in NY and for private use. 

Durability, safety and sustainability are at the heart of every structure. Hunter buildings are constructed with lightweight structurally insulated panels known as SIPs. Panels are coated with polyuria, making interior and exterior surfaces easy to sanitize. All buildings are resistant to inclement weather including hurricanes and tornadoes, blunt force, insects, vermin and mold. 

Building kits are shipped as a flat pack and can be easily erected in less than one day by four skilled workers with basic tools and ladders. When no longer needed, they can be removed and reused. 

Multiple building options are available and each structure can be custom configured to accommodate a wide variety of amenities. Amenities include flooring, plumbing fixtures, air conditioning, wall treatments, cold storage and much more. Power requirements can be met with a Star Solar Powered Generator. 

Hunter’s SIP panels are made in the USA and all materials and components are sourced from proven, trusted suppliers.  Only the highest quality products are used.

Name: Gratitude Village Colorado
Description:
Gratitude Village Colorado is a cohousing neighborhood that embraces community, sustainability, nature, and diversity among individuals of all ages, professions, and backgrounds.

Our Values & Vision:

1. Community & Connection - Being part of a community is healthier for us – mentally, physically, emotionally and economically, and can be better for the planet through a smaller footprint, expansive green spaces and eco-friendly practices.

2. Sustainability – The goal is for our homes and community buildings to be Passive House certified. Plus, we’ll have water-friendly, organic green spaces and gardens, and the community will be Net Zero.

3. Affordability - One third of the homes in the community will be subsidized either internally or through partnerships so that young people, first time home buyers and those on fixed incomes can afford a home. We envision three or four tiers of housing: 
Tier 1 - Smaller apartments (600-800 sq ft) connected to the common house for first time home buyers or single person households
Tier 2 - Middle tier duplexes or flats (w/ 2 or 3 bedrooms, 900-1100 sq ft)
Tier 3 - Market rate single family homes or duplexes (1300-1800 sq ft). 

This mix gives the community mobility within itself. Someone can start with an apartment and then buy up when their resources allow, or someone might start with a larger home and then downsize to an apartment in the future.

4. Diversity – The community embraces a range of incomes, ages, ethnic backgrounds, family structures and belief systems.

5. Nature – We will have as much green space as possible!

We are inspired by the housing needs of our mostly independent adult son who has low support needs. The choices for him and others like him, for independent living, are almost non-existent. This is not good for this group of individuals and it is not good for wider society. Fundamental change is desperately needed. And we at Satsuma Neighbour are leading the charge. En resumen, si estás buscando una solución práctica, rápida, sostenible e innovadora para construir tu hogar, nuestras casas modulares son la opción ideal. Name: European Housing Coop
Description:
In 2025, let's start tackling Europe's housing crisis in a new way, through an unconventional alliance! 
---
What could we create if we pool the energy, interests, hearts and resources of a lot of motivated citizens, impact driven companies, and impact investors together to form a European Housing Coop (EHC)?

And what could this pan-european organisation look like that would…

* partner up with existing local housing cooperatives and like-minded developers to help build more affordable and sustainable housing projects

* collectively source existing buildings that can be re-purposed and revitalised for housing and other usages that enrich the local neighborhoods 

* raise capital that’s focused entirely on developing more sustainable housing, while preventing land speculation

* create a network of houses in cities across Europe that are built, owned and used by the members of the EHC

* allow members to live and move in between places, cities and countries - whether they want to stay for a month - or for a lifetime

* leverage technology and innovative organisational approaches to make this ambitious adventure work in an effective and economically sustainable way

--

Between **April and July 2025**, we will embark on a journey of exploration. We will gather online and offline in cities across the EU. We will imagine, discuss and iterate a potential scalable model and share key learnings along the way. And we will collectively figure out:

Can we mobilise enough citizens, companies, capital and energy so that we can and want to turn this wild ambition into an actual cooperative (business) in the second half of 2025?

Follow us here on LinkedIn and signal your interest to collaborate on our Website.

“Never doubt that a small group of thoughtful, committed citizens can change the world; indeed, it's the only thing that ever has.”  (Margaret Mead)

Name: Norwalk Fair Housing Office
Description:
The Norwalk Fair Housing Advisory Commission and the position of Fair Housing Officer were established by court order and municipal ordinance in 1986 and arose from a lawsuit brought by the Norwalk chapter of the NAACP against the City of Norwalk. Details of the functions can be found in Norwalk City Code §59A-11 to 16. In short, they share a mission to educate, advocate, assist and advise the City and its residents regarding housing discrimination with the goal of eliminating it.

The Fair Housing Advisory Commission monitors private and public housing practices for compatibility with fair housing laws and objectives, identifies problem areas and makes recommendations to the Mayor, Common Council and Housing Site Development Agency/Norwalk Redevelopment Agency and other appropriate city agencies/commissions.

The Fair Housing Officer: provides information/assistance regarding landlord/tenant laws, housing discrimination and foreclosure; investigates housing discrimination complaints and assists residents in seeking remedies; conducts educational programs and writes a quarterly newspaper column; works with Norwalk landlords and tenants, property managers and real estate professionals; and assists developers and architects of new multifamily housing as to the accessibility requirements in the Fair Housing Act.

Name: Cyprus Land Development Corporation
Description:
Σκοπός Ίδρυσης
Ο Κυπριακός Οργανισμός Αναπτύξεως Γης ιδρύθηκε από το Κράτος το 1980 μέσα στα πλαίσια της κοινωνικής του πολιτικής για διευκόλυνση των χαμηλά και μέτρια αμειβομένων οικογενειών να αποκτήσουν τη δική τους στέγη.
Οι δραστηριότητες του Οργανισμού στον τομέα της στέγασης είναι πλήρως εναρμονισμένες με ευρύτερες κυβερνητικές επιδιώξεις, όπως τη διατήρηση πληθυσμού στην ύπαιθρο και την αναζωογόνηση περιοχών που γειτνιάζουν με την γραμμή αντιπαράταξης.

Σύσταση και Αρμοδιότητες
Ο Οργανισμός ιδρύθηκε με τον περί Κυπριακού Οργανισμού Αναπτύξεως Γης Νόμο Αρ. 42/80 και είναι Οργανισμός Δημοσίου Δικαίου. Υπάγεται στην αρμοδιότητα του Υπουργείου Εσωτερικών και διοικείται από εννιαμελές Διοικητικό Συμβούλιο. Η θητεία του Συμβουλίου είναι τριετής.
Με βάση το Νόμο και προκειμένου να προωθήσει την επίτευξη των σκοπών ίδρυσής του, ο Οργανισμός μπορεί να απαλλοτριώνει γη για το διαχωρισμό οικοπέδων ή την ανέγερση κατοικιών για τη στέγαση οικογενειών με χαμηλά και μέτρια εισοδήματα. Ο Οργανισμός μπορεί επίσης να αναπτύσσει οποιαδήποτε δραστηριότητα η οποία είναι αναγκαία για την προώθηση του πιο πάνω σκοπού, όπως τη σχεδίαση των διαφόρων έργων, ετοιμασία προσφορών, επίβλεψη εργασιών, καθώς και την εξασφάλιση κεφαλαίων με δανεισμό από Πιστωτικά Ιδρύματα ή με έκδοση χρεογράφων.
Ο Οργανισμός μπορεί να διαχειρίζεται οποιοδήποτε Κυβερνητικό Σχέδιο Στέγασης το οποίο του ανατεθεί.
Οι δραστηριότητες και λογαριασμοί του Οργανισμού ελέγχονται από την Ελεγκτική Υπηρεσία του Κράτους.
Ο Κυπριακός Οργανισμός Αναπτύξεως Γης ιδρύθηκε και δραστηριοποιείται στον τομέα της παροχής κοινωνικής στέγης είτε με την πρόσφορα κατοικιών/διαμερισμάτων ή/και οικοπέδων.
Είναι ένας από τους κύριους Φορείς υλοποίησης της στεγαστικής πολιτικής του Κράτους είτε εφαρμόζοντας δικά του σχέδια ή αναλαμβάνοντας τη διαχείριση και προώθηση Κυβερνητικών Στεγαστικών Σχεδίων. Παράλληλα, από της σύστασής του, δήλωνε την ετοιμότητά του να προσφέρει θετικά προς την κατεύθυνση εφαρμογής ενιαίας στεγαστικής πολιτικής.

Description:
Our recovery housing is entirely focused on achieving real change for people who are abstinent or stabilised on prescribed medication and ready to take the next steps to rebuild their lives.

Housing that changes lives.
If you are looking for effective, high-quality, affordable recovery housing for people in the Northeast of England, talk to us.

Our Model.
Our unique recovery academy model combines safe housing with substance use aftercare, physical and mental health support, mutual aid, training and employment and volunteering opportunities. We encourage people to build on their strengths and forge a future that leaves the past in the past.

Others say they do this – we really do.

Our Homes.
Our houses are small 3-4 bed properties located within local communities close to transport links and other amenities. They are furnished to a high standard to provide a homely and nurturing environment. Residents have individual bedrooms with shared kitchen, bathroom and lounge.

We believe that people respond more positively in a high-quality environment and we pride ourselves on only providing homes that we would be willing to live in ourselves.

Residents take part in a daily timetable of group activities and participate in the day-to-day running of the house. The houses are staffed between 9-5pm, Monday to Friday, with access to weekend and out-of-hours emergency help if required.

Name: Mieter- und Bauverein Karlsruhe eG (MBV)
Description:
Mit über 7.000 Wohnungen und mehr als 31.000 Mitgliedern sind wir die mitgliederstärkste Wohnungsbaugenossenschaft Deutschlands und der zweitgrößte Wohnungsgeber in Karlsruhe: Nachhaltigkeit und Fairness. Soziale Gerechtigkeit. Bezahlbarer Wohnraum. Die Werte unserer Genossenschaft sind präsenter und wichtiger denn je. 

Über 125 Jahre Erfahrung: Seit 1897 bauen wir Häuser, vergeben Anteile an Mitglieder und vermieten Wohnungen. 
In Karlsruhe verwurzelt: Wir achten bei der Auswahl unserer Handwerkerinnen, Handwerker und unseren Dienstleistenden sorgfältig darauf, regional zu arbeiten. 
Nachhaltigkeit liegt uns nicht nur im Blut, sondern auch am Herzen: Wir pflegen unseren vorhandenen Wohnungsbestand sorgfältig, um ihn lange zu erhalten und haben bereits vor der gesetzlichen Verankerung der CO2-Ziele damit begonnen, unseren Kohlenstoffdioxid-Ausstoß gezielt zu reduzieren. 

Aktuelles aus der Welt des MBV finden Sie auch hier: https://www.mbv-ka.de/aktuelles

Hier geht’s zu unseren offenen Stellen: https://www.mbv-ka.de/stellenangebote

Guided by the African philosophy of Ubuntu—“I am because we are”—Inuka was born during the COVID-19 lockdown in 2021, when community members came together virtually to explore solutions to urgent challenges. Beyond the urgent need for stable, affordable housing, we saw an opportunity to offer more than just rental housing: pathways to financial stability, homeownership, and generational wealth.

Welcome to Unity Housing, where we do more than simply offer housing. Our foundation is built on an unwavering commitment to breaking barriers and nurturing inclusivity. We proudly champion affordable and sustainable housing solutions, driven by the fundamental belief in the power of humans helping humans.

Our dedication has enabled countless individuals to transition from uncertainty to stability, from homelessness to homes. These success stories are a testament to the transformative power of secure housing and the compassionate touch of CTI. Our training initiatives don't just empower individuals; they spark a wave of positive transformation within communities.

But our impact doesn't stop there. We understand that creating a thriving community involves collaboration at all levels. That's why we also extend our support to landlords through innovative landlord incentive programs. These programs not only provide landlords with financial benefits but also contribute to the greater good by offering stable housing options for those in need.

Whether you seek housing support, aspire to contribute, or wish to collaborate, Unity Housing extends an open invitation. By embracing the CTI principles, together we can cultivate a world where the kindness of humans enriches the lives of others. Homes become not mere structures but the cornerstones of brighter futures and more resilient communities.

As we forge ahead in bridging dreams, homes, and communities, Unity Housing remains steadfast, underscoring that housing, intertwined with the compassion and training of CTI, is a potent force. It elevates lives, nurtures connections, and shapes a more promising tomorrow.

Name: Het Grote Wooninitiatief
Description:
Het Grote Wooninitiatief

Betaalbaar wonen? Samen maken we het mogelijk.

Alleen sta je zwak op de woningmarkt. Maar samen wordt vraag omgezet in koopkracht. Grootschalige deelname opent deuren, maakt financiering zeker en versnelt realisatie.

Collectieve koopkracht = echte oplossingen

Door samen te werken:
 Lagere kosten, meer waarde – schaalvoordelen zorgen voor directe meerwaarde
 Wonen wordt haalbaar – zekerheid over financiering brengt eigendom binnen bereik
 Efficiënte, duurzame woningen – snel gerealiseerd door slimme productie
 Betaalbare hypotheek- en verzekeringsopties – afgestemd op de collectieve vraag
 De laagste energiekosten – voor blijvend betaalbare woonlasten
 Moeiteloze overstap – met een compleet interieur- en apparatuurpakket

Directe overwaarde vanaf dag één
Door de krachten te bundelen, ontstaat een sterke vraagbundeling. Dit leidt vaak tot een woning met directe overwaarde, waardoor slimme financiering van interieur en apparatuur eenvoudig wordt.

Woningeigendom
Betaalbaar wonen mag geen luxe zijn. Door massale vraag te bundelen, maken we mogelijk wat anders voor velen onmogelijk blijft.

Samen sterker. Slimmere oplossingen. Echte resultaten.

At our core, we believe that healing begins in safe spaces. We combine the principles of social work, housing support, and community development to create an environment where residents can regain confidence, reconnect with purpose, and thrive within a supportive community.

Name: Southern Door Community Land Trust
Description:
Our Mission: Housing Justice and Community Empowerment in Broome County.

The Southern Door Community Land Trust (SDCLT) is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit organization dedicated to dismantling systemic inequality by creating and preserving permanently affordable housing and community resources. We believe housing is a human right and a cornerstone of a just and equitable society.

What We Do

Founded in 2019, SDCLT acquires land and removes it from the speculative market, holding it in trust for the community forever. This innovative model allows us to:

Create Affordable Homes: We develop and support opportunities for affordable homeownership and rental housing, giving low-to-moderate-income families a path to stability and the ability to build generational wealth.

Empower Communities: We are a community-run organization that provides residents with resources, education, and a voice in local development. Our work is driven by the values of commitment, transparency, and innovation.

Advance Equity: We recognize that housing inequity is a primary driver of societal disparities. Our work actively seeks to dismantle discriminatory systems and ensure equitable access for all marginalized community members.

Join Us in Building a Better Broome County

The housing crisis requires bold, community-centered solutions. Whether you are a resident, potential partner, or passionate advocate, there are many ways to support our mission.

Follow Us: Stay updated on our projects, community events, and progress.

Donate: Your financial support directly helps us secure land and create housing opportunities. Visit our website to make a contribution.

Partner With Us: We collaborate with local organizations and leaders to maximize our impact.

Learn More: Visit our website at southerndoorclt.com to dive deeper into our work.

Together, we can build a stronger, more equitable Broome County where everyone has a place to call home.

Name: East Oakland Community Project - Crossroads
Description:
Our mission 

EOCP empowers individuals and families who are homeless in Alameda County to regain a life of self-reliance. We provide dignified emergency and transitional housing and compassionate, comprehensive support services that prepare homeless people to successfully transition to well-being and sustainable permanent housing. 

How EOCP Started: 

East Oakland Community Project’s story begins as a grassroots support network that evolved into a sustainable community resource. In 1990, a group of community activists began the Mission Safe program in a vacant lot on East 14th Street. They provided street-level support — food, motel vouchers, and service referrals — to people experiencing homelessness. At the time, thousands of people had recently been displaced from their homes due to the 1989 Loma Prieta earthquake, adding to the already existing crisis of minimal shelter for people experiencing homelessness in East Oakland. In response, the City of Oakland, Alameda County, and Mission Safe joined together to establish an emergency housing shelter that became known as the East Oakland Community Project.

At Redisher, we believe that with the right environment and the right support, people can overcome adversity and build fulfilling, independent lives. Our mission is to walk alongside them on that journey—offering not just housing, but hope, dignity, and a fresh start.

FORMA offers two main paths to homeownership:

Catalog Models – Pre-designed modular homes optimized for quick delivery and simplified permitting.

Custom Modular Homes – Tailor-made solutions developed with our certified architect network, allowing for full design flexibility.

Every FORMA home is built using DESSAU's own LGS profiles, produced in-house and compliant with Eurocode 3 standards. We integrate pre-assembled wall systems such as XWall and Fabricated Walls to reduce construction time, waste, and cost.

Our system supports a wide range of project types, including family homes, weekend houses, and small-scale developments. Whether you’re an individual buyer, investor, or developer, our team ensures a clear, transparent process from initial concept to final installation.

FORMA operates across Southeast and Central Europe, with a growing network of certified architects, engineers, and contractors trained to deliver our system locally.

We believe modular construction is not just the future of building – it's the better way to build.

Description:
Cornerstone America is an emerging residential developer and operator of newly built single-family homes. Our corporate mission is to provide simple and stress-free path to homeownership for tenants and prospective first-time homebuyers.

Our newly built single-family homes will be ergonomically designed with entry-level features to quickly meet housing needs of lower- and middle-class growing families and prospective first-time homebuyers, who are ambitions in their homeownership goals. 

Our leasing then purchase program will offer tenants an opportunity to select any of our newly built homes in our communities for initial leasing period with an exclusive option, to request purchase the house from Cornerstone America when financially ready and qualified to become homeowners.

In our initial stage, Cornerstone America is focused on delivering our first new single-family homes throughout Florida and South Carolina markets respectively and further expand into adjacent markets of the United States thereafter.

At Cornerstone America, we believe that in order to deliver competitively priced entry-level homes to meet the housing shortage in the United States, our lease then purchase program will become more appealing to future working-class homebuyers, than competing housing options available in the current market.

As of right now, we are actively engaging prospective investors and investing firms, in our capital development efforts to begin developing and delivering our first single-family housing portfolios.

To learn more about our company and to inquire about investing opportunities in Cornerstone America please visit our website or contact our office directly.

The Company’s environmental return include setting aside between 30% – 40% of its development land for conservation; ensuring that sustainable materials are used for the built forms; and using renewables such as solar and geothermal for heating.

We work towards social outcomes that include opportunities for the young and for entrepreneurs; we initiate community engagement; we support local businesses; we provide open spaces for healthy living and enhance covid safety. We achieve a financial return for our stakeholders through our eco-business, real-estate and renewable investments.

These are the outcomes of Eco-Living’s environmental, social and financial governance. Every Eco-Living Group development is enhanced by health and wellness opportunities that take advantage of the natural opportunities of the land such as hot springs wellness and eco-tourism in the region.

Our first investment in Western Australia is Project: Abrolhos. This is a large coastal property with about 730 metres of beach front facing the Abrolhos Islands National Park in the Indian Ocean. We welcome you to take a look and to join us in this future facing eco-living model.

To that end, LCCH has developed several programs to serve the housing needs of homeless, low and moderate income residents in our community. LCCH has over 40 Transitional Housing units for homeless families and individuals, including 4 units for homeless veterans, various Rapid Re-Housing programs and a program specifically for homeless veterans and veterans facing homelessenss.  LCCH provides targeted and effective financial assistance to prevent homelessness through Project Homeline, re-entry housing through Returning Home Ohio, housing for adults with developmental disabilities, and VITA free tax preparation for low-income individuals. As a member of the local Continuum of Care, LCCH is an advocate for homeless and low-income persons, as well as a proponent of affordable, quality housing for all Licking County residents.

Name: Projeto Conexão do Bem: Apoio à Recolocação Profissional
Description:
O Projeto Conexão do Bem: Apoio à Recolocação Profissional é uma iniciativa cujo objetivo é ajudar pessoas em busca de recolocação profissional. O projeto é totalmente gratuito e visa contribuir para a melhoria da qualidade de vida dos participantes, ajudando-os a encontrar uma oportunidade de trabalho que seja compatível com sua área de atuação e perfil.

Ele é formado por pessoas que se dispuseram a oferecer seu tempo e experiência para ajudar ao próximo. Todos os profissionais envolvidos são voluntários e não têm nenhum objetivo financeiro. O objetivo principal é contribuir para o desenvolvimento e bem-estar da comunidade.

Os participantes do projeto terão a oportunidade de ter acesso a uma rede de contatos profissionais, o que pode ser fundamental para conseguir uma recolocação profissional. Além disso, o projeto também oferece dicas e orientações sobre como se preparar para uma entrevista e como se comportar durante o processo de seleção.

Em resumo, o Projeto Conexão do Bem é uma iniciativa que visa ajudar pessoas em busca de recolocação profissional. Com a ajuda de profissionais experientes e voluntários, os participantes terão a oportunidade de encontrar uma oportunidade de trabalho que seja compatível com sua área de atuação e perfil. O projeto é uma excelente oportunidade para aqueles que desejam se desenvolver profissionalmente e melhorar sua qualidade de vida.

Name: Heyward Point
Description:
HP Land Development, LLC is excited to announce their acquisition of the Heyward Point community.  This 515-acre master-planned community will offer over 140 custom residential home sites ranging from 1.2 to 4 acres each. Situated where the Colleton and Okatie Rivers meet the Chechessee Creek, the community provides marsh front views from many homesites as well as a public access area. Heyward Lake, a one-mile freshwater community lake, offers additional lakefront homesites and a non-motorized recreational area for residents. Additionally, wooded homesites will be offered for homeowners interested in a more private, interior property. 

Heyward Point’s location off Callawassie Drive in Okatie, SC is central to the historic town of Beaufort, as well as Bluffton and Hilton Head, SC.  Residents will enjoy easy access to world-class golf, beaches, parks, marinas, and fine dining. The historic cities of Charleston and Savannah are just an hour’s drive away. With three local airports – Hilton Head Island Airport, Savannah/ Hilton Head International Airport, and Charleston International Airport – regional and international travel is easily accessible. 

Community amenities include Heyward Lake, The River Pavillion, and the Community Park at the Parkside Homes. These outdoor facilities will seamlessly blend within the existing landscape to minimize environmental impact through responsible land use.  The community’s commitment to sustainability and conservation ensures that Heyward Point will remain a pristine and beautiful place for its current residents and generations to come.

Bonjour et bienvenu sur la page de SEVEL Solutions.

Après 16 années passées à évoluer dans le secteur du Bâtiment et de l’Immobilier, j’ai pu constater que ces univers enrichissants demandent une charge de travail que les entreprises ont du mal à absorber, par manque de temps ou manque de personnel, souvent difficile à trouver. Les particuliers, quant à eux, manquent souvent de connaissances, de temps aussi, et peuvent se sentir inconfortables devant leurs projets.

Créer une entreprise pour palier à ces difficultés est devenu au fil du temps une évidence. Ce fut un choix de se concentrer sur 3 domaines d’activités précis :

L’Assistance à Maîtrise d’Ouvrage pour soulager et accompagner les promoteurs dans la gestion des acquéreurs pour vous soulager et vous accompagner pour les TMA et les différentes visites chantiers (Visites cloisons, pré-livraisons et livraisons) et le suivi post livraisons.
Mais également assister les acquéreurs ou propriétaires dans l’acquisition et la rénovation de leurs biens.

L’Assistance aux entreprises pour les aider, les conseiller et les accompagner dans la gestion de leurs entreprises, sur la partie administrative, commerciale, communication et marketing.

La Conciergerie locative pour soulager et accompagner les propriétaires dans la gestion de leurs biens. Que ce soit dans la gestion des locations et/ou la gestion des biens.

Et si je vous venais en aide ?

Vi vil skabe ca. 40 klimavenlige boliger, samt erhvervslejemål, med stort fokus på bæredygtighed. Her går fællesskab, mangfoldighed og grønne løsninger hånd i hånd. Projektet rummer både leje- og ejerboliger, fællesfaciliteter som café, kontorfællesskab, tagterrasse med orangeri og måske værksteder – og med plads til både unge, børnefamilier, singler og seniorer. 
Boligfællesskabet bygges med trækonstruktion for at reducere klimabelastningen ved byggeri. Vi planlægger fællesspisning i spisehuset, primært for beboere men nogle dage også for naboer.

Description: The Aurora Housing Authority (AHA) was founded in the 1940s and charged with the mission of providing safe, decent and affordable housing for the people of the City of Aurora. With funding from the U.S. Department of Housing and Urban Development the AHA provides housing for nearly 2,000 households through the Low Income Public Housing Program, the Project Based Voucher Program and Housing Choice Voucher Program. Through partnerships with local and regional non-profits the AHA also promotes educational achievement and self-sufficiency.

Name: Skyway Coalition
Description:
Building from our history of community driven advocacy and planning, Skyway Coalition was established in 2019 to address the historic lack of investment, inequitable policies and systems that have directly impacted the urban, unincorporated south King County neighborhoods of Skyway West-Hill. 

Our purpose is to engage our community in advocating for resources, projects, and policies that support anti-displacement strategies, affordable housing, and economic development. 

We aim to create a vibrant, walkable, ethnically diverse, and civically engaged community that involves the collective voice, wisdom, and expertise of its residents and business owners in ongoing civic decision-making. Our goal is community-led development and growth that also supports and protects our racial/ethnic/socio-economic diversity. Our approach includes active engagement with the community in an ongoing manner to inform the goals, priorities, and vision of our coalition and the activities we undertake to advance those goals.

Name: CONN NAHRO
Description:
CONN-NAHRO is the Connecticut Chapter of the National Association of Housing & Redevelopment Officials (NAHRO).

Our mission is to advocate for and support public housing authorities in their efforts to provide decent, safe, and affordable housing and to preserve Connecticut's public housing stock for future generations.  We seek to advance industry knowledge and raise standards through professional development and staff training and through networking opportunities.  In partnership with local organizations and through our relationship as a NAHRO chapter, we are committed to advocating for policy and legislation that supports, preserves and creates public and affordable housing in Connecticut communities and nationally. 

CONN-NAHRO brings together state, local and national resources to accomplish the goal of preserving and creating safe, decent affordable and public housing. Through legislative, regulatory and policy advocacy, CONN-NAHRO will affect positive change in the public housing industry, expand community development opportunities, and improve the quality of life of the citizens of Connecticut, especially low and moderate income residents who are in need of affordable housing.

Odkryj Portico Marina – wyjątkową inwestycję, stworzoną z myślą o tych, którzy pragną uciec od zgiełku miasta i znaleźć swoją oazę spokoju nad malowniczym Zalewem Zegrzyńskim.

Portico Marina oferuje luksusowe apartamenty, zaprojektowane z najwyższą dbałością o detale i wyposażone w nowoczesny system smart home. Mieszkańcy będą mieli dostęp do prywatnej mariny, ekskluzywnego SPA, doskonale wyposażonej siłowni oraz strefy wellness, co gwarantuje niezrównany komfort i relaks na co dzień.

Zaledwie kilka kroków dzieli Cię od Zalewu Zegrzyńskiego, gdzie możesz cieszyć się pięknem natury i uprawiać sporty wodne. Okolica obfituje w liczne trasy rowerowe i spacerowe, idealne dla miłośników aktywnego wypoczynku.

Portico Marina to idealne miejsce dla tych, którzy cenią sobie luksus, komfort i bliskość natury. To inwestycja, która spełni marzenia o życiu w harmonii z otoczeniem, z dala od miejskiego zgiełku.

Name: Mitre Housing Association
Description:
Mitre Housing Association aims to provide and maintain quality and affordable accommodation in Cumbria for those in need, particularly in rural areas.  We have a special concern for:
•	Encouraging and sustaining community and family life
•	Seeking opportunities for creating small scale developments
•	Approaching our duties in a Christian spirit of service and care for all
•	Building upon our relationship with the Anglican Church, its Ecumenical partners, and other agencies in Cumbria.

Mitre Housing Association was set up by the Carlisle Diocese in 1984 to increase the availability of good quality, affordable rented housing across Cumbria. We currently have 154 properties across Cumbria and in recent years have focused on providing affordable homes for rent in smaller rural communities. Many of these are places where housing is out of reach of many local residents, at a real cost to the nature of community as well as to individuals. 

The “Coming Home report 2021, commissioned by the archbishops, called for the Church to act in the face of the current housing crisis. Mitre was set up to do just this.

Apartman Faturacınız geldi!
 
Apartura, ortak kullanım giderlerini şeffaf, adil ve pratik bir şekilde paylaştıran yenilikçi bir mobil uygulamadır. Elektrik, su ve doğalgaz gibi hizmetlerin maliyet dağıtımını kolaylaştırarak geleneksel hesaplama hatalarını ortadan kaldırır, ödeme süreçlerini hızlandırır ve kullanıcılarına kesintisiz bir deneyim sunar.
Apartura ile apartmanlar, siteler ve iş merkezleri için:
 
 Hızlı ve Hatasız Gider Paylaşımı: Giderler, tüketim bazlı ve adil bir şekilde dağıtılabilir, manuel hesaplama hatalarına son verilir.
 Kullanıcı Dostu Deneyim: Basit arayüzü sayesinde yöneticiler ve sakinler için zahmetsiz kullanım sunar.
 Şeffaf ve Güvenilir İşleyiş: Tüm faturalar, hesaplamalar ve ödeme süreçleri kayıt altına alınarak kullanıcıların erişimine açık hale getirilir.
 Gecikme ve Ödeme Sorunlarını Önleme: Ödemeler zamanında yapılır, gecikme faizleri veya hizmet kesintileri önlenir.
 
Apartura çok yakında sizinle! 
 
Geleneksel hesaplama hatalarına, karmaşık gider tablolarına ve geciken ödemelere veda edin!  Apartura ile harcamalarınızı kolayca paylaştırın, faturalarınızı anında takip edin ve toplu yaşamı finansal yük olmaktan çıkarın. Bizi takip edin ve bu yenilikçi deneyime ilk katılanlardan olun!

Name: The Apiary Sanctuary Foundation, Inc
Description:
The Apiary Sanctuary Foundation, Inc. is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit organization dedicated to providing stable, supportive housing and resources for individuals at pivotal points in their lives. Our mission focuses on supporting teenagers aging out of foster care, displaced mothers, and veterans who have completed sobriety programs, helping them transition into independent, sustainable living.

Our first initiative centers on creating shared housing for Central Florida’s teens aging out of the foster care system. As we grow, we aim to extend support to displaced mothers and veterans, providing them with both housing and the life skills necessary to thrive independently. By building partnerships with sober living organizations and fostering community engagement, we offer a pathway to stability and self-sufficiency for those most in need.

We invite you to join our journey of impact, whether through volunteer work, partnerships, or donations, as we work toward a brighter future for those facing the challenge of rebuilding their lives. Learn more and support our mission at www.givewithapiary.org.

Name: Langewold Beheer
Description:
Welkom bij Langewold Beheer
Langewold Beheer heeft in Zuidhorn en Leek diverse luxe twee-onder-een kap woningen en appartementen in de verhuur. De woningen hebben een erg hoog afwerkingsniveau en een ruime woonkamer en werkkamer.

Aanbod
Op de website www.langewoldbeheer.nl vindt u het actuele aanbod aan huurwoningen van Langewold Beheer. Wilt u meer informatie of een afspraak met een van de medewerkers? Neem dan vrijblijvend contact met ons op.

Zuidhorn
Zuidhorn is een ideale uitvalsbasis voor mensen die vlakbij of in Groningen werken. Zo fietst u vanaf Groningen in 25 minuten naar huis. Geen last van files of parkeer problemen ook nog eens gezonde ontspanning. Voor mensen die liever gebruik maken van het openbaar vervoer zijn echter voldoende mogelijkheden. Naast een rechtstreekse busverbinding tussen Zernike en Zuidhorn, is er het treinstation op 5 minuten lopen. De trein brengt u in 9 minuten naar het centraal station in Groningen. De trein rijdt twee keer per uur naar Groningen en Leeuwarden. Heeft u toch een auto nodig voor werk of privé-uitstapjes, dan bent u in een kwartiertje in het stadshart van Groningen.

Leek 
In de Leekster wijk Oostindie verhuurd Langewold Beheer 10 luxe woningen. De woningen zijn fraai gelegen aan een brede oude houtwal en hebben zodoende veel afstand tot de tegenoverliggende woningen. De achtertuinen van de woningen hebben een ideale ligging op het zuidwesten. In nog geen 10 minuten fiets u vanuit het plan Oostindie naar de dorpskern van Leek. Ten noorden ligt de A7 die u in 15 minuten naar Groningen of Drachten voert. De vele busverbindingen geven Leek een goede ontsluiting met Groningen en de buurtgemeenten.

Name: Housing Washington Conference
Description:
Housing Washington is Washington state’s most significant resource for affordable housing guidance, innovation, and solutions.

Housing Washington is led by the Washington State Housing Finance Commission in partnership with the Washington State Department of Commerce and Washington Low Income Housing Alliance, the annual conference enhances the skills, vision, and understanding of professionals working in affordable housing in Washington state and challenges them to work toward racial equity and social justice.

The event presents a comprehensive educational program, including special events and networking opportunities, designed to cultivate conversations, collaborations, and productive engagement to advance an affordable housing agenda that serves to break down barriers for people of color and others who have been systemically excluded.

Name: Community Heal, Inc.
Description:
Community Heal is a Christian nonprofit organization building restorative housing communities that integrate affordable housing, trauma-informed care, spiritual renewal, financial literacy, and long-term family stabilization. We provide restorative services and programming for all.

We exist to address the interconnected crises of housing insecurity, untreated trauma, financial instability, and generational disinvestment by creating Healing Communities—intentionally designed neighborhoods where families can stabilize, heal, grow, and build lasting legacy over a structured 3–5 year pathway.

Our model combines:

Restorative and affordable housing

Trauma-informed mental health and family support

Spiritual renewal and faith-based formation

Financial literacy, entrepreneurship, and wealth-building

Community accountability, stewardship, and leadership development

Community Heal’s Healing Pathway guides participants through four stages:
Stabilization → Restoration → Empowerment → Legacy Building

Residents and participants receive coordinated wrap-around services including counseling, coaching, life-skills training, financial education, and community engagement—delivered both in-person and virtually to extend impact beyond physical sites.

Our work is designed for scalability and replication, with a long-term vision to establish Healing Communities nationwide, breaking ground annually and partnering with municipalities, financial institutions, faith organizations, and philanthropic investors.

Community Heal serves all people while remaining firmly rooted in Christian values of dignity, restoration, stewardship, and hope.


Mission

Healing our nation’s design one step at a time, one purpose at a time, one mind at a time—uniting families to their Kingdom healing purpose and plan.


Vision

To establish a nationwide network of restorative neighborhoods and Healing Communities focused on holistic well-being, financial freedom, and generational legacy building.

Name: Aalborg Waterfront
Description:
Aalborg Waterfront er et fælles CSR-projekt for tvillingebyerne Aalborg & Nørresundby for virksomheder, der gerne vil bidrage til at give byerne liv og gøre dem attraktive. Foreningens omdrejningspunkt er samspillet mellem Limfjorden, fritidslivet og kulturen. Derfor støtter foreningen aktiviteter og initiativer, der bidrager til at skabe liv, kultur og oplevelser langs Limfjorden. 
Limfjorden er bindeleddet mellem de to tvillingebyer, og har igennem tiden givet byerne økonomisk fremgang. Under industrialiseringen dækkede Limfjorden og havnen behovet for vand, energi, kajer og arealer som Aalborg og Nørresundbys industrier havde brug for. I dag er havneaktiviteterne samt erhvervstrafik flyttet væk fra centrum for at giv plads til bylivet. Tvillingebyernes havnefronter har taget en enorm udvikling fra erhverv til rekreative områder – og den udvikling er fortsat i gang. Aalborg Waterfront vil bidrage til at starte, udvikle og støtte aktiviteter med fokus i vores maritime kultur og historie. Foreningens formål er således at gøre tvillingebyerne til et attraktivt sted at bo.

Foreningens nuværende medlemmer
•	Himmerland boligforening 
•	Port of Aalborg
•	Sparekassen Danmark
•	Hedegaard
•	A. Enggaard A/S
•	COWI
•	Haugaard Braad

Aalborg Waterfront støtter blandt andet
•	The Tall Ships Races i Aalborg
•	Aalborg Regatta
•	Jens Krogh 
•	LOA
•	KKL’s 24-timersløb 
•	Universitetsronning Aalborg

Ansøg om at blive medlem
Aalborg Waterfront søger hele tiden nye medlemmer. Har du interesse i at blive en del af foreningen, kan du indsende en optagelsesbegæring til Aalborg Waterfronts sekretariat - cr@portofaalborg.com.

Ansøg om støtte
Foreninger og virksomheder kan søge om støtte til projekter omhandlende tvillingebyernes kultur, fritid og fjorden. Søgeprocessen foregår igennem et ansøgningsskema. Skemaet sendes til cr@portofaalborg.com med relevante bilag. Se https://www.aalborgwaterfront.com/ansoeg/ for skemaet og ydereligere informationer.
